Ablation studies further validate our approach’s effectiveness, robustness, and generalizability across different model backbones. Our work offers a scalable, efficient solution for OOD detection, setting a new state-of-the-art in this area.
摘要：异常分布(OOD)检测对于神经网络的安全部署至关重要。现有的基于CLIP的方法通过设计新的评分函数或复杂的微调方法来执行OOD检测。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的、无需训练的OOD检测方法SETAR，该方法利用视觉语言和视觉模型中的权重矩阵的选择性低阶近似。SETAR通过使用简单的贪婪搜索算法对模型的权重矩阵进行事后修改来增强OOD检测。在SETAR的基础上，我们进一步提出了SETAR+FT，这是一种优化面向对象检测任务的模型性能的微调扩展。对ImageNet1K和Pascal-VOC基准的广泛评估表明，Setar的性能优越，与零镜头和微调基准相比，假阳性率分别降低了18.95%和36.80%。消融研究进一步验证了我们的方法在不同模型主干上的有效性、健壮性和通用性。我们的工作为OOD检测提供了一个可扩展的、高效的解决方案，在该领域树立了新的艺术水平。

[NLP-37] Judging the Judges: Evaluating Alignment and Vulnerabilities in LLMs-as-Judges
[NLP-37] 评判法官：评估法学硕士担任法官的一致性和脆弱性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12624
作者: Aman Singh Thakur,Kartik Choudhary,Venkat Srinik Ramayapally,Sankaran Vaidyanathan,Dieuwke Hupkes
关键词: rapidly gaining traction, evaluating large language, Offering a promising, large language models, promising solution
中文关键词: 迅速获得吸引力，评估大型语言，提供有前途的大型语言模型和有前途的解决方案
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Offering a promising solution to the scalability challenges associated with human evaluation, the LLM-as-a-judge paradigm is rapidly gaining traction as an approach to evaluating large language models (LLMs). However, there are still many open questions about the strengths and weaknesses of this paradigm, and what potential biases it may hold. In this paper, we present a comprehensive study of the performance of various LLMs acting as judges. We leverage TriviaQA as a benchmark for assessing objective knowledge reasoning of LLMs and evaluate them alongside human annotations which we found to have a high inter-annotator agreement. Our study includes 9 judge models and 9 exam taker models – both base and instruction-tuned. We assess the judge model’s alignment across different model sizes, families, and judge prompts. Among other results, our research rediscovers the importance of using Cohen’s kappa as a metric of alignment as opposed to simple percent agreement, showing that judges with high percent agreement can still assign vastly different scores. We find that both Llama-3 70B and GPT-4 Turbo have an excellent alignment with humans, but in terms of ranking exam taker models, they are outperformed by both JudgeLM-7B and the lexical judge Contains, which have up to 34 points lower human alignment. Through error analysis and various other studies, including the effects of instruction length and leniency bias, we hope to provide valuable lessons for using LLMs as judges in the future.
摘要：作为一种评估大型语言模型(LLM)的方法，作为一种评估大型语言模型(LLM)的方法，作为一种有前景的解决方案，作为一种与人类评估相关的可扩展性挑战，LLM-as-a-Screen范例正在迅速获得青睐。然而，关于这一范式的优点和缺点，以及它可能存在的潜在偏见，仍有许多悬而未决的问题。在这篇文章中，我们提出了一个全面的研究，不同的LLMS作为裁判的表现。我们利用TriviaQA作为评估LLM的客观知识推理的基准，并与我们发现具有高度注释者之间的一致性的人类注释一起进行评估。我们的研究包括9个裁判模型和9个考生模型–既有基础模型，也有教学模型。我们通过不同的模型大小、族和裁判提示来评估裁判模型的一致性。在其他结果中，我们的研究重新发现了使用科恩的kappa作为一致性的衡量标准的重要性，而不是简单的百分比一致性，表明具有高百分比一致性的法官仍然可以给出非常不同的分数。我们发现，Llama-3 70B和GPT-4 Turbo都与人类有很好的一致性，但在排名考生模型方面，它们的表现都超过了JudgeLM-7B和词汇法官包含，后者的人类一致性低了34分。通过错误分析和其他各种研究，包括指令长度和宽大偏差的影响，我们希望为未来使用LLMS作为法官提供有价值的经验教训。

[NLP-38] Growing Trees on Sounds: Assessing Strategies for End-to-End Dependency Parsing of Speech
[NLP-38] 在声音上种植树木：评估语音端到端依赖性解析策略

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12621
作者: Adrien Pupier,Maximin Coavoux,Jérôme Goulian,Benjamin Lecouteux
关键词: Direct dependency parsing, Direct dependency, Automatic Speech Recognition, parsing speech transcriptions, recently been proposed
中文关键词: 直接依赖解析、直接依赖、自动语音识别、解析语音转录，最近被提出
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Accepted at ACL 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Direct dependency parsing of the speech signal – as opposed to parsing speech transcriptions – has recently been proposed as a task (Pupier et al. 2022), as a way of incorporating prosodic information in the parsing system and bypassing the limitations of a pipeline approach that would consist of using first an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system and then a syntactic parser. In this article, we report on a set of experiments aiming at assessing the performance of two parsing paradigms (graph-based parsing and sequence labeling based parsing) on speech parsing. We perform this evaluation on a large treebank of spoken French, featuring realistic spontaneous conversations. Our findings show that (i) the graph based approach obtain better results across the board (ii) parsing directly from speech outperforms a pipeline approach, despite having 30% fewer parameters.
摘要：语音信号的直接依赖性解析（与解析语音转录相反）最近被提出作为一项任务（Pupier等人，2022），作为将韵律信息纳入解析系统并绕过流水线方法的限制的一种方式，该方法包括首先使用自动语音识别（ASB）系统，然后使用语法解析器。在本文中，我们报告了一组实验，旨在评估两种解析范式（基于图的解析和基于序列标记的解析）在语音解析方面的性能。我们对一个大型法语口语树库进行此评估，其中包括现实的自发对话。我们的研究结果表明，（i）基于图的方法总体上可以获得更好的结果（ii）直接从语音解析优于流水线方法，尽管参数少了30%。

[NLP-39] What makes two models think alike?
[NLP-39] 是什么让两个模特的想法相同？

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12620
作者: Jeanne Salle,Louis Jalouzot,Nur Lan,Emmanuel Chemla,Yair Lakretz
关键词: architectural differences significantly, differences significantly affect, process language, significantly affect, models represent
中文关键词: 架构差异显着，差异显着影响，过程语言，显着影响，模型代表
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 7 pages, 6 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Do architectural differences significantly affect the way models represent and process language? We propose a new approach, based on metric-learning encoding models (MLEMs), as a first step to answer this question. The approach provides a feature-based comparison of how any two layers of any two models represent linguistic information. We apply the method to BERT, GPT-2 and Mamba. Unlike previous methods, MLEMs offer a transparent comparison, by identifying the specific linguistic features responsible for similarities and differences. More generally, the method uses formal, symbolic descriptions of a domain, and use these to compare neural representations. As such, the approach can straightforwardly be extended to other domains, such as speech and vision, and to other neural systems, including human brains.
摘要：架构差异是否显着影响模型表示和处理语言的方式？我们提出了一种基于度量学习编码模型（MLEM）的新方法，作为回答这个问题的第一步。该方法提供了对任何两个模型的任何两层如何表示语言信息的基于特征的比较。我们将该方法应用于BERT、GPT-2和Mamba。与以前的方法不同，MLEM通过识别导致相似之处和差异的特定语言特征来提供透明的比较。更一般地说，该方法使用领域的正式、符号描述，并使用这些来比较神经表示。因此，该方法可以直接扩展到其他领域，例如语音和视觉，以及其他神经系统，包括人类大脑。

[NLP-40] From Insights to Actions: The Impact of Interpretability and Analysis Research on NLP
[NLP-40] 从见解到行动：可解释性和分析研究对NLP的影响

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12618
作者: Marius Mosbach,Vagrant Gautam,Tomás Vergara-Browne,Dietrich Klakow,Mor Geva
关键词: NLP, goal of developing, developing a deeper, deeper understanding, NLP systems
中文关键词: NLP，目标是开发、发展更深入、更深入的理解，NLP系统
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Interpretability and analysis (IA) research is a growing subfield within NLP with the goal of developing a deeper understanding of the behavior or inner workings of NLP systems and methods. Despite growing interest in the subfield, a commonly voiced criticism is that it lacks actionable insights and therefore has little impact on NLP. In this paper, we seek to quantify the impact of IA research on the broader field of NLP. We approach this with a mixed-methods analysis of: (1) a citation graph of 185K+ papers built from all papers published at ACL and EMNLP conferences from 2018 to 2023, and (2) a survey of 138 members of the NLP community. Our quantitative results show that IA work is well-cited outside of IA, and central in the NLP citation graph. Through qualitative analysis of survey responses and manual annotation of 556 papers, we find that NLP researchers build on findings from IA work and perceive it is important for progress in NLP, multiple subfields, and rely on its findings and terminology for their own work. Many novel methods are proposed based on IA findings and highly influenced by them, but highly influential non-IA work cites IA findings without being driven by them. We end by summarizing what is missing in IA work today and provide a call to action, to pave the way for a more impactful future of IA research.
摘要：可解释性与分析(IA)研究是自然语言处理领域中一个不断发展的分支领域，其目的是加深对自然语言处理系统和方法的行为或内部工作原理的理解。尽管人们对这一子领域的兴趣与日俱增，但一个常见的批评是，它缺乏可操作的见解，因此对NLP几乎没有影响。在本文中，我们试图量化IA研究对更广泛的NLP领域的影响。我们通过混合方法分析来实现这一点：(1)从2018年到2023年在ACL和EMNLP会议上发表的所有论文建立的185K+论文的引文图，以及(2)对NLP社区138名成员的调查。我们的定量结果表明，IA的工作在IA之外被很好地引用，并在NLP引文图中处于中心位置。通过对调查回复的定性分析和对556篇论文的手工注释，我们发现，NLP研究人员在IA工作的基础上，认识到它对NLP、多个子领域的进步是重要的，并将其结果和术语用于他们自己的工作。许多新的方法是基于信息分析的结果提出的，并受到它们的高度影响，但有很大影响力的非信息分析工作引用了信息分析的结果，而不是受到它们的驱动。最后，我们总结了当今IA工作中缺少的东西，并提供了行动呼吁，为IA研究更有影响力的未来铺平了道路。

[NLP-41] EUvsDisinfo: a Dataset for Multilingual Detection of Pro-Kremlin Disinformation in News Articles
[NLP-41] EUvsDisinfo：用于多语言检测新闻文章中亲克里姆林宫虚假信息的数据集

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12614
作者: João A. Leite,Olesya Razuvayevskaya,Kalina Bontcheva,Carolina Scarton
关键词: work introduces EUvsDisinfo, work introduces, disinformation articles related, introduces EUvsDisinfo, articles related
中文关键词: 工作介绍EUvsDisinfo，工作介绍，虚假信息相关文章，介绍EUvsDisinfo，相关文章
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: 4 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This work introduces EUvsDisinfo, a multilingual dataset of trustworthy and disinformation articles related to pro-Kremlin themes. It is sourced directly from the debunk articles written by experts leading the EUvsDisinfo project. Our dataset is the largest to-date resource in terms of the overall number of articles and distinct languages. It also provides the largest topical and temporal coverage. Using this dataset, we investigate the dissemination of pro-Kremlin disinformation across different languages, uncovering language-specific patterns targeting specific disinformation topics. We further analyse the evolution of topic distribution over an eight-year period, noting a significant surge in disinformation content before the full-scale invasion of Ukraine in 2022. Lastly, we demonstrate the dataset’s applicability in training models to effectively distinguish between disinformation and trustworthy content in multilingual settings.
摘要：这项工作介绍了EUvsDisinfo，这是一个多语言数据集，包含与亲克里姆林宫主题相关的值得信赖和虚假信息文章。它直接来源于领导EUvsDisinfo项目的专家撰写的揭穿文章。就文章总数和不同语言而言，我们的数据集是迄今为止最大的资源。它还提供了最大的话题和时间报道。使用该数据集，我们调查了亲克里姆林宫虚假信息在不同语言中的传播，揭示了针对特定虚假信息主题的特定语言模式。我们进一步分析了八年来话题分布的演变，并指出在2022年全面入侵乌克兰之前，虚假信息内容显着激增。最后，我们展示了该数据集在训练模型中的适用性，以有效区分多语言环境中的虚假信息和值得信赖的内容。

[NLP-42] Rapid Language Adaptation for Multilingual E2E Speech Recognition Using Encoder Prompting
[NLP-42] 使用编码器预处理的多语言E2E语音识别快速语言适应

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12611
作者: Yosuke Kashiwagi,Hayato Futami,Emiru Tsunoo,Siddhant Arora,Shinji Watanabe
关键词: multilingual speech recognition, models handle multiple, handle multiple languages, incorporating language identification, Connectionist Temporal Classification
中文关键词: 多语言语音识别，模型处理多种，处理多种语言，结合语言识别，连接主义时态分类
类目: ound (cs.SD); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Audio and Speech Processing (eess.AS)
备注: Accepted by INTERSPEECH 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:End-to-end multilingual speech recognition models handle multiple languages through a single model, often incorporating language identification to automatically detect the language of incoming speech. Since the common scenario is where the language is already known, these models can perform as language-specific by using language information as prompts, which is particularly beneficial for attention-based encoder-decoder architectures. However, the Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) approach, which enhances recognition via joint decoding and multi-task training, does not normally incorporate language prompts due to its conditionally independent output tokens. To overcome this, we introduce an encoder prompting technique within the self-conditioned CTC framework, enabling language-specific adaptation of the CTC model in a zero-shot manner. Our method has shown to significantly reduce errors by 28% on average and by 41% on low-resource languages.
摘要：端到端多语言语音识别模型通过单个模型处理多种语言，通常结合语言识别来自动检测输入语音的语言。由于常见的情况是语言已经已知，因此这些模型可以通过使用语言信息作为提示来执行特定于语言的功能，这对于基于注意力的编码器-解码器架构特别有益。然而，通过联合解码和多任务训练来增强识别的连接主义时态分类（CTC）方法，由于其有条件独立的输出标记，通常不包含语言提示。为了克服这个问题，我们在自适应的CTC框架中引入了编码器提示技术，以零触发方式实现CTC模型的特定语言适应。事实证明，我们的方法平均可以将错误率显着减少28%，在低资源语言上减少41%。

[NLP-43] Bridging Local Details and Global Context in Text-Attributed Graphs
[NLP-43] 文本属性图中局部细节和全局上下文的桥梁

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12608
作者: Yaoke Wang,Yun Zhu,Wenqiao Zhang,Yueting Zhuang,Yunfei Li,Siliang Tang
关键词: Graph Neural Networks, Representation learning, combine semantic textual, real-world applications, contextual textual information
中文关键词: 图形神经网络、表示学习、结合语义文本、现实世界应用程序、上下文文本信息
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Representation learning on text-attributed graphs (TAGs) is vital for real-world applications, as they combine semantic textual and contextual structural information. Research in this field generally consist of two main perspectives: local-level encoding and global-level aggregating, respectively refer to textual node information unification (e.g., using Language Models) and structure-augmented modeling (e.g., using Graph Neural Networks). Most existing works focus on combining different information levels but overlook the interconnections, i.e., the contextual textual information among nodes, which provides semantic insights to bridge local and global levels. In this paper, we propose GraphBridge, a multi-granularity integration framework that bridges local and global perspectives by leveraging contextual textual information, enhancing fine-grained understanding of TAGs. Besides, to tackle scalability and efficiency challenges, we introduce a graphaware token reduction module. Extensive experiments across various models and datasets show that our method achieves state-of-theart performance, while our graph-aware token reduction module significantly enhances efficiency and solves scalability issues.
摘要：文本属性图(标签)上的表示学习对于现实世界的应用是至关重要的，因为它们结合了语义文本和上下文结构信息。该领域的研究通常包括两个主要角度：局部级别编码和全局级别聚集，分别指文本节点信息统一(例如，使用语言模型)和结构增强建模(例如，使用图神经网络)。已有的研究大多侧重于将不同层次的信息组合在一起，而忽略了节点之间的互连，即节点之间的上下文文本信息，它提供了连接局部和全局的语义洞察力。在本文中，我们提出了GraphBridge，这是一个多粒度的集成框架，通过利用上下文文本信息来连接局部和全局视角，增强对标签的细粒度理解。此外，为了解决可伸缩性和效率方面的挑战，我们引入了Graphaware令牌还原模块。在不同模型和数据集上的大量实验表明，我们的方法获得了最先进的性能，而我们的图感知令牌约简模块显著提高了效率并解决了可伸缩性问题。

[NLP-44] Low-Redundant Optimization for Large Language Model Alignment
[NLP-44] 大型语言模型对齐的低冗余优化

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12606
作者: Zhipeng Chen,Kun Zhou,Wayne Xin Zhao,Jingyuan Wang,Ji-Rong Wen
关键词: Large language models, Large language, tasks and scenarios, struggling in aligning, complex tasks
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、大型语言、任务和场景、难以协调、复杂任务
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 14 pages, working in progress

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language models (LLMs) are still struggling in aligning with human preference in complex tasks and scenarios. They are prone to overfit into the unexpected patterns or superficial styles in the training data. We conduct an empirical study that only selects the top-10% most updated parameters in LLMs for alignment training, and see improvements in the convergence process and final performance. It indicates the existence of redundant neurons in LLMs for alignment training. To reduce its influence, we propose a low-redundant alignment method named \textbfALLO, focusing on optimizing the most related neurons with the most useful supervised signals. Concretely, we first identify the neurons that are related to the human preference data by a gradient-based strategy, then identify the alignment-related key tokens by reward models for computing loss. Besides, we also decompose the alignment process into the forgetting and learning stages, where we first forget the tokens with unaligned knowledge and then learn aligned knowledge, by updating different ratios of neurons, respectively. Experimental results on 10 datasets have shown the effectiveness of ALLO. Our code and data are available at \urlthis https URL.
摘要：在复杂的任务和场景中，大型语言模型(LLM)仍然难以与人类的偏好保持一致。他们容易过度适应训练数据中意想不到的模式或肤浅的风格。我们进行了一项实证研究，只选择LLMS中更新最多的前10个参数进行对齐训练，并在收敛过程和最终性能方面有所改善。这表明在对齐训练中，LLMS中存在冗余神经元。为了减少这种影响，我们提出了一种低冗余度的对齐方法–TextbfALLO，专注于用最有用的监督信号来优化最相关的神经元。具体来说，我们首先通过基于梯度的策略识别与人类偏好数据相关的神经元，然后通过用于计算损失的奖励模型来识别与排列相关的关键标记。此外，我们还将比对过程分解为遗忘和学习阶段，在这两个阶段中，我们分别通过更新不同比例的神经元，首先忘记具有未对齐知识的标记，然后学习对齐知识。在10个数据集上的实验结果表明了ALLO的有效性。我们的代码和数据可在此HTTPS URL上找到。

[NLP-45] PromptDSI: Prompt-based Rehearsal-free Instance-wise Incremental Learning for Document Retrieval
[NLP-45] EntDSI：用于文档检索的基于预算的免排练实例增量学习

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12593
作者: Tuan-Luc Huynh,Thuy-Trang Vu,Weiqing Wang,Yinwei Wei,Trung Le,Dragan Gasevic,Yuan-Fang Li,Thanh-Toan Do
关键词: Pre-trained Language Models, utilizes Pre-trained Language, Differentiable Search Index, Differentiable Search, Language Models
中文关键词: 预训练的语言模型，利用预训练的语言、可区分搜索索引、可区分搜索、语言模型
类目: Information Retrieval (cs.IR); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: 21 pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Differentiable Search Index (DSI) utilizes Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) for efficient document retrieval without relying on external indexes. However, DSIs need full re-training to handle updates in dynamic corpora, causing significant computational inefficiencies. We introduce PromptDSI, a rehearsal-free, prompt-based approach for instance-wise incremental learning in document retrieval. PromptDSI attaches prompts to the frozen PLM’s encoder of DSI, leveraging its powerful representation to efficiently index new corpora while maintaining a balance between stability and plasticity. We eliminate the initial forward pass of prompt-based continual learning methods that doubles training and inference time. Moreover, we propose a topic-aware prompt pool that employs neural topic embeddings as fixed keys. This strategy ensures diverse and effective prompt usage, addressing the challenge of parameter underutilization caused by the collapse of the query-key matching mechanism. Our empirical evaluations demonstrate that PromptDSI matches IncDSI in managing forgetting while significantly enhancing recall by over 4% on new corpora.
摘要：可区分搜索索引(DSI)利用预先训练的语言模型(PLM)在不依赖外部索引的情况下进行高效的文档检索。然而，DSI需要完全的再培训来处理动态语料库中的更新，这导致了严重的计算效率低下。我们介绍了PromptDSI，这是一种在文档检索中进行实例增量学习的免预演、基于提示的方法。PromptDSI将提示附加到冻结的PLM的DSI编码器，利用其强大的表示法高效地索引新的语料库，同时保持稳定性和可塑性之间的平衡。我们消除了基于提示的持续学习方法的初始前向传递，这种方法使训练和推理时间翻了一番。此外，我们还提出了一个主题感知提示池，该提示池使用神经主题嵌入作为固定关键字。这一策略确保了多样化和有效的即时使用，解决了查询-键匹配机制崩溃导致的参数未充分利用的挑战。我们的经验评估表明，PromptDSI在管理遗忘方面与IncDSI相当，同时在新语料库上显著提高了4%以上的召回率。

[NLP-46] Breaking the Ceiling of the LLM Community by Treating Token Generation as a Classification for Ensembling
[NLP-46] 通过将代币生成视为集成分类来打破LLM社区的天花板

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12585
作者: Yao-Ching Yu,Chun-Chih Kuo,Ziqi Ye,Yu-Cheng Chang,Yueh-Se Li
关键词: Ensembling multiple models, Large Language Model, classification probability vectors, open-source Large Language, multiple models
中文关键词: 集成多个模型、大型语言模型、分类概率载体、开源大型语言、多个模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Ensembling multiple models has always been an effective approach to push the limits of existing performance and is widely used in classification tasks by simply averaging the classification probability vectors from multiple classifiers to achieve better accuracy. However, in the thriving open-source Large Language Model (LLM) community, ensembling methods are rare and typically limited to ensembling the full-text outputs of LLMs, such as selecting the best output using a ranker, which leads to underutilization of token-level probability information. In this paper, we treat the Generation of each token by LLMs as a Classification (GaC) for ensembling. This approach fully exploits the probability information at each generation step and better prevents LLMs from producing early incorrect tokens that lead to snowballing errors. In experiments, we ensemble state-of-the-art LLMs on several benchmarks, including exams, mathematics and reasoning, and observe that our method breaks the existing community performance ceiling. Furthermore, we observed that most of the tokens in the answer are simple and do not affect the correctness of the final answer. Therefore, we also experimented with ensembling only key tokens, and the results showed better performance with lower latency across benchmarks.
摘要：多模型集成一直是突破现有性能极限的一种有效方法，通过简单地平均多个分类器的分类概率向量来获得更好的精度，在分类任务中得到了广泛的应用。然而，在蓬勃发展的开源大型语言模型(LLM)社区中，集成方法很少，通常仅限于集成LLM的全文输出，例如使用排序器选择最佳输出，这导致令牌级概率信息未得到充分利用。在本文中，我们将LLMS生成的每个令牌视为一个用于集成的分类(GAC)。这种方法充分利用了每一生成步骤的概率信息，更好地防止了LLM产生早期错误的令牌，从而导致滚雪球错误。在实验中，我们在几个基准上集成了最先进的LLM，包括考试、数学和推理，并观察到我们的方法打破了现有的社区性能上限。此外，我们观察到答案中的大多数令牌都很简单，并不影响最终答案的正确性。因此，我们还对仅集成关键令牌进行了实验，结果显示在基准测试中具有更好的性能和更低的延迟。

[NLP-47] Mathador-LM: A Dynamic Benchmark for Mathematical Reasoning on Large Language Models
[NLP-47] Mathador-LM：大型语言模型数学推理的动态基准

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12572
作者: Eldar Kurtic,Amir Moeini,Dan Alistarh
关键词: combining ruleset interpretation, large language models, combining ruleset, ruleset interpretation, large language
中文关键词: 结合规则集解释、大型语言模型、结合规则集、规则集解释、大型语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We introduce Mathador-LM, a new benchmark for evaluating the mathematical reasoning on large language models (LLMs), combining ruleset interpretation, planning, and problem-solving. This benchmark is inspired by the Mathador game, where the objective is to reach a target number using basic arithmetic operations on a given set of base numbers, following a simple set of rules. We show that, across leading LLMs, we obtain stable average performance while generating benchmark instances dynamically, following a target difficulty level. Thus, our benchmark alleviates concerns about test-set leakage into training data, an issue that often undermines popular benchmarks. Additionally, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of both open and closed-source state-of-the-art LLMs on Mathador-LM. Our findings reveal that contemporary models struggle with Mathador-LM, scoring significantly lower than average 3rd graders. This stands in stark contrast to their strong performance on popular mathematical reasoning benchmarks.
摘要：介绍了一种集规则集解释、规划和问题求解于一体的大型语言模型(LLMS)数学推理评测工具Mathado-LM。这个基准测试的灵感来自Mathado游戏，该游戏的目标是在给定的一组基数上使用基本的算术运算，遵循一组简单的规则，达到一个目标数。我们表明，在领先的LLM中，我们在遵循目标难度水平的情况下，在动态生成基准实例的同时获得了稳定的平均性能。因此，我们的基准缓解了对测试集泄漏到训练数据的担忧，这个问题经常破坏流行的基准。此外，我们在Mathado-LM上对开源和闭源的最先进的LLM进行了全面的评估。我们的发现显示，当代模特在Mathado-LM上表现不佳，得分明显低于三年级学生的平均水平。这与他们在流行的数学推理基准上的强劲表现形成了鲜明对比。

[NLP-48] Applying Ensemble Methods to Model-Agnostic Machine-Generated Text Detection
[NLP-48] 将整合方法应用于模型不可知的机器生成文本检测

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12570
作者: Ivan Ong,Boon King Quek
关键词: large language model, detecting machine-generated text, language model, study the problem, problem of detecting
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，检测机器生成的文本，语言模型，研究问题，检测问题
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In this paper, we study the problem of detecting machine-generated text when the large language model (LLM) it is possibly derived from is unknown. We do so by apply ensembling methods to the outputs from DetectGPT classifiers (Mitchell et al. 2023), a zero-shot model for machine-generated text detection which is highly accurate when the generative (or base) language model is the same as the discriminative (or scoring) language model. We find that simple summary statistics of DetectGPT sub-model outputs yield an AUROC of 0.73 (relative to 0.61) while retaining its zero-shot nature, and that supervised learning methods sharply boost the accuracy to an AUROC of 0.94 but require a training dataset. This suggests the possibility of further generalisation to create a highly-accurate, model-agnostic machine-generated text detector.
摘要：在本文中，我们研究了当机器生成文本可能源自的大型语言模型（LLM）未知时检测机器生成文本的问题。我们通过对DetectGPT分类器（Mitchell等人，2023）的输出应用集成方法来做到这一点，DetectGPT分类器是一种用于机器生成文本检测的零镜头模型，当生成（或基础）语言模型与区分（或评分）语言模型相同时，它具有高度准确性。我们发现，DetectGPT子模型输出的简单汇总统计数据可产生0.73（相对于0.61）的AUROC，同时保留其零触发性质，并且监督学习方法将准确性大幅提高到0.94的AUROC，但需要训练数据集。这表明有可能进一步推广，以创建一个高度准确、模型不可知的机器生成文本检测器。

[NLP-49] RichRAG: Crafting Rich Responses for Multi-faceted Queries in Retrieval-Augmented Generation
[NLP-49] RichRAG：为检索增强一代中的多方面收件箱制作丰富的响应

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12566
作者: Shuting Wang,Xin Xu,Mang Wang,Weipeng Chen,Yutao Zhu,Zhicheng Dou
关键词: large language models, Retrieval-augmented generation, language models, static knowledge, knowledge and hallucination
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、检索增强生成、语言模型、静态知识、知识和幻觉
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) effectively addresses issues of static knowledge and hallucination in large language models. Existing studies mostly focus on question scenarios with clear user intents and concise answers. However, it is prevalent that users issue broad, open-ended queries with diverse sub-intents, for which they desire rich and long-form answers covering multiple relevant aspects. To tackle this important yet underexplored problem, we propose a novel RAG framework, namely RichRAG. It includes a sub-aspect explorer to identify potential sub-aspects of input questions, a multi-faceted retriever to build a candidate pool of diverse external documents related to these sub-aspects, and a generative list-wise ranker, which is a key module to provide the top-k most valuable documents for the final generator. These ranked documents sufficiently cover various query aspects and are aware of the generator’s preferences, hence incentivizing it to produce rich and comprehensive responses for users. The training of our ranker involves a supervised fine-tuning stage to ensure the basic coverage of documents, and a reinforcement learning stage to align downstream LLM’s preferences to the ranking of documents. Experimental results on two publicly available datasets prove that our framework effectively and efficiently provides comprehensive and satisfying responses to users.
摘要：检索增强生成(RAG)有效地解决了大型语言模型中的静态知识和幻觉问题。现有的研究大多集中在用户意图明确、答案简明的问题场景上。然而，普遍的情况是，用户发出具有不同子意图的广泛的、开放式的查询，他们希望得到涵盖多个相关方面的丰富和长格式的答案。为了解决这一重要但尚未被探索的问题，我们提出了一个新的RAG框架，即RichRAG。它包括用于识别输入问题的潜在子方面的子方面浏览器、用于构建与这些子方面相关的各种外部文档的候选库的多方面检索器、以及生成式列表排序器，它是为最终生成器提供前k个最有价值的文档的关键模块。这些排序的文档充分涵盖了各种查询方面，并知道生成器的偏好，从而激励生成器为用户生成丰富而全面的响应。我们对排名员的培训包括监督微调阶段，以确保文档的基本覆盖，以及强化学习阶段，以使下游LLM的偏好与文档的排名保持一致。在两个公开可用的数据集上的实验结果表明，该框架能够有效和高效地向用户提供全面和满意的响应。

[NLP-50] Low-Resource Machine Translation through the Lens of Personalized Federated Learning
[NLP-50] 个性化联邦学习视角下的低资源机器翻译

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12564
作者: Viktor Moskvoretskii,Nazarii Tupitsa,Chris Biemann,Samuel Horváth,Eduard Gorbunov,Irina Nikishina
关键词: Personalized Federated Learning, Federated Learning algorithm, Natural Language Tasks, Learning algorithm MeritFed, Personalized Federated
中文关键词: 个性化联邦学习、联邦学习算法、自然语言任务、学习算法MeritFed、个性化联邦
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: 18 pages, 7 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We present a new approach based on the Personalized Federated Learning algorithm MeritFed that can be applied to Natural Language Tasks with heterogeneous data. We evaluate it on the Low-Resource Machine Translation task, using the dataset from the Large-Scale Multilingual Machine Translation Shared Task (Small Track #2) and the subset of Sami languages from the multilingual benchmark for Finno-Ugric languages. In addition to its effectiveness, MeritFed is also highly interpretable, as it can be applied to track the impact of each language used for training. Our analysis reveals that target dataset size affects weight distribution across auxiliary languages, that unrelated languages do not interfere with the training, and auxiliary optimizer parameters have minimal impact. Our approach is easy to apply with a few lines of code, and we provide scripts for reproducing the experiments at this https URL
摘要：我们提出了一种基于个性化联邦学习算法MeritFed的新方法，该方法可应用于具有异类数据的自然语言任务。我们使用大规模多语言机器翻译共享任务（Small Track #2）的数据集和芬兰-乌戈尔语言多语言基准中的萨米语子集，在低资源机器翻译任务中对其进行评估。除了有效性外，MeritFed还具有高度可解释性，因为它可以用于跟踪用于培训的每种语言的影响。我们的分析表明，目标数据集大小会影响辅助语言之间的权重分布，不相关的语言不会干扰训练，并且辅助优化器参数的影响最小。我们的方法只需几行代码即可轻松应用，并且我们提供了在此https URL上重现实验的脚本

[NLP-51] MultiSocial: Multilingual Benchmark of Machine-Generated Text Detection of Social-Media Texts
[NLP-51] MultiSocial：社交媒体文本机器生成文本检测的多语言基准

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12549
作者: Dominik Macko,Jakub Kopal,Robert Moro,Ivan Srba
关键词: generate high-quality multilingual, Recent LLMs, indistinguishable for humans, generate high-quality, humans from authentic
中文关键词: 生成高质量的多语言、最新的LLM，人类无法区分，从真实的中生成高质量的人类
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recent LLMs are able to generate high-quality multilingual texts, indistinguishable for humans from authentic human-written ones. Research in machine-generated text detection is however mostly focused on the English language and longer texts, such as news articles, scientific papers or student essays. Social-media texts are usually much shorter and often feature informal language, grammatical errors, or distinct linguistic items (e.g., emoticons, hashtags). There is a gap in studying the ability of existing methods in detection of such texts, reflected also in the lack of existing multilingual benchmark datasets. To fill this gap we propose the first multilingual (22 languages) and multi-platform (5 social media platforms) dataset for benchmarking machine-generated text detection in the social-media domain, called MultiSocial. It contains 472,097 texts, of which about 58k are human-written and approximately the same amount is generated by each of 7 multilingual LLMs. We use this benchmark to compare existing detection methods in zero-shot as well as fine-tuned form. Our results indicate that the fine-tuned detectors have no problem to be trained on social-media texts and that the platform selection for training matters.
摘要：最近的LLMS能够生成高质量的多语言文本，人类无法区分真实的人类书写的文本。然而，机器生成文本检测的研究主要集中在英语和更长的文本上，如新闻文章、科学论文或学生论文。社交媒体文本通常要短得多，通常以非正式语言、语法错误或不同的语言项目(如表情符号、标签)为特色。在研究现有方法检测这类文本的能力方面存在差距，这也反映在缺乏现有的多语种基准数据集上。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了第一个多语言(22种语言)和多平台(5个社交媒体平台)的数据集，用于在社交媒体领域对机器生成的文本检测进行基准测试，称为MultiSocial。它包含472,097个文本，其中约58k是人写的，7个多语种LLM中的每一个都产生了大致相同的数量。我们使用这个基准来比较现有的零炮和微调形式的检测方法。我们的结果表明，微调的检测器在社交媒体文本上训练没有问题，训练平台的选择很重要。

[NLP-52] P-Tailor: Customizing Personality Traits for Language Models via Mixture of Specialized LoRA Experts
[NLP-52] P-Tailor：通过专业LoRA专家的混合定制语言模型的个性特征

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12548
作者: Yuhao Dan,Jie Zhou,Qin Chen,Junfeng Tian,Liang He
关键词: Personalized large language, large language models, attracted great attention, emotional support, personality traits
中文关键词: 个性化的大语言、大语言模型、引起极大关注、情感支持、性格特征
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Personalized large language models (LLMs) have attracted great attention in many applications, such as intelligent education and emotional support. Most work focuses on controlling the character settings based on the profile (e.g., age, skill, experience, and so on). Conversely, the psychological theory-based personality traits with implicit expression and behavior are not well modeled, limiting their potential application in more specialized fields such as the psychological counseling agents. In this paper, we propose a mixture of experts (MoE)-based personalized LLMs, named P-tailor, to model the Big Five Personality Traits. Particularly, we learn specialized LoRA experts to represent various traits, such as openness, conscientiousness, extraversion, agreeableness and neuroticism. Then, we integrate P-Tailor with a personality specialization loss, promoting experts to specialize in distinct personality traits, thereby enhancing the efficiency of model parameter utilization. Due to the lack of datasets, we also curate a high-quality personality crafting dataset (PCD) to learn and develop the ability to exhibit different personality traits across various topics. We conduct extensive experiments to verify the great performance and effectiveness of P-Tailor in manipulation of the fine-grained personality traits of LLMs.
摘要：个性化大语言模型在智能教育、情感支持等领域的应用引起了人们的广泛关注。大多数工作都集中在根据配置文件(例如，年龄、技能、经验等)来控制角色设置。相反，以心理学理论为基础的具有内隐表情和行为的人格特质没有得到很好的建模，限制了其在更专业的领域的潜在应用，如心理咨询代理。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于混合专家(MOE)的个性化LLMS，称为P-TRANOR，用于对五大人格特质进行建模。特别是，我们学习专门的劳拉专家来代表各种特质，如开放性、尽职尽责、外向、随和和神经质。然后，我们将P-Tailor与人格特化损失相结合，促进专家对不同的人格特质进行专攻，从而提高模型参数的使用效率。由于缺乏数据集，我们还策划了一个高质量的个性制作数据集(PCD)，以学习和发展在不同主题中展示不同个性特征的能力。我们进行了大量的实验，以验证P-Tailor在操纵LLMS的细粒度人格特征方面的出色性能和有效性。

[NLP-53] Liar Liar Logical Mire: A Benchmark for Suppositional Reasoning in Large Language Models
[NLP-53] 说谎者说谎者逻辑沼泽：大型语言模型中假设推理的基准

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12546
作者: Philipp Mondorf,Barbara Plank
关键词: represent a classic, classic genre, knaves problems represent, Knights and knaves, statements
中文关键词: 代表经典，经典流派，恶棍问题代表，骑士和恶棍，陈述
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 22 pages, 19 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Knights and knaves problems represent a classic genre of logical puzzles where characters either tell the truth or lie. The objective is to logically deduce each character’s identity based on their statements. The challenge arises from the truth-telling or lying behavior, which influences the logical implications of each statement. Solving these puzzles requires not only direct deductions from individual statements, but the ability to assess the truthfulness of statements by reasoning through various hypothetical scenarios. As such, knights and knaves puzzles serve as compelling examples of suppositional reasoning. In this paper, we introduce \textitTruthQuest , a benchmark for suppositional reasoning based on the principles of knights and knaves puzzles. Our benchmark presents problems of varying complexity, considering both the number of characters and the types of logical statements involved. Evaluations on \textitTruthQuest show that large language models like Llama 3 and Mixtral-8x7B exhibit significant difficulties solving these tasks. A detailed error analysis of the models’ output reveals that lower-performing models exhibit a diverse range of reasoning errors, frequently failing to grasp the concept of truth and lies. In comparison, more proficient models primarily struggle with accurately inferring the logical implications of potentially false statements.
摘要：骑士和恶棍的问题代表了一种经典的逻辑谜题类型，人物要么说实话，要么撒谎。其目的是根据每个角色的陈述从逻辑上推断他们的身份。挑战来自于说真话或撒谎的行为，这会影响每一句话的逻辑含义。解决这些难题不仅需要从个别陈述中直接推断，还需要通过各种假设情景的推理来评估陈述的真实性。因此，骑士和恶棍的谜题是令人信服的假设推理的例子。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于骑士和恶棍谜题原理的虚拟推理基准-.考虑到所涉及的字符数量和逻辑语句的类型，我们的基准测试提出了不同复杂性的问题。对tex tiTruthQuest的评估显示，像Llama 3和Mixtral-8x7B这样的大型语言模型在解决这些任务方面表现出极大的困难。对模型输出的详细错误分析表明，表现较差的模型表现出各种各样的推理错误，经常无法理解真理和谎言的概念。相比之下，更熟练的模型主要是努力准确地推断潜在错误陈述的逻辑含义。

[NLP-54] Unified Active Retrieval for Retrieval Augmented Generation
[NLP-54] 用于检索增强生成的统一主动检索

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12534
作者: Qinyuan Cheng,Xiaonan Li,Shimin Li,Qin Zhu,Zhangyue Yin,Yunfan Shao,Linyang Li,Tianxiang Sun,Hang Yan,Xipeng Qiu
关键词: Retrieval-Augmented Generation, Active Retrieval, Unified Active Retrieval, retrieval, helpful and applying
中文关键词: 检索-增强生成、主动检索、统一主动检索、检索、有用和应用
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), retrieval is not always helpful and applying it to every instruction is sub-optimal. Therefore, determining whether to retrieve is crucial for RAG, which is usually referred to as Active Retrieval. However, existing active retrieval methods face two challenges: 1. They usually rely on a single criterion, which struggles with handling various types of instructions. 2. They depend on specialized and highly differentiated procedures, and thus combining them makes the RAG system more complicated and leads to higher response latency. To address these challenges, we propose Unified Active Retrieval (UAR). UAR contains four orthogonal criteria and casts them into plug-and-play classification tasks, which achieves multifaceted retrieval timing judgements with negligible extra inference cost. We further introduce the Unified Active Retrieval Criteria (UAR-Criteria), designed to process diverse active retrieval scenarios through a standardized procedure. Experiments on four representative types of user instructions show that UAR significantly outperforms existing work on the retrieval timing judgement and the performance of downstream tasks, which shows the effectiveness of UAR and its helpfulness to downstream tasks.
摘要：在检索增强生成(RAG)中，检索并不总是有帮助的，将其应用于每一条指令都是次优的。因此，确定是否检索对于RAG来说是至关重要的，这通常被称为主动检索。然而，现有的主动检索方法面临着两个挑战：1.它们通常依赖于单一的标准，难以处理各种类型的指令。2.它们依赖于专业化和高度差异化的程序，因此将它们结合在一起会使RAG系统更加复杂，并导致更高的响应延迟。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了统一主动检索(UAR)。UAR包含四个正交准则，并将它们投射到即插即用分类任务中，实现了多方面的检索时机判断，而额外的推理代价可以忽略不计。我们进一步介绍了统一主动检索标准(UAR-Criteria)，旨在通过标准化程序处理不同的主动检索场景。在四种典型用户指令上的实验表明，UAR在检索时间判断和下游任务的性能上明显优于已有的工作，表明了UAR的有效性和对下游任务的帮助。

[NLP-55] FuseGen: PLM Fusion for Data-generation based Zero-shot Learning
[NLP-55] FueGen：PLM Fusion，用于基于数据生成的零镜头学习

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12527
作者: Tianyuan Zou,Yang Liu,Peng Li,Jianqing Zhang,Jingjing Liu,Ya-Qin Zhang
关键词: Small Task-specific Models, Pre-trained Language Models, training Small Task-specific, Task-specific Models, Language Models
中文关键词: 小型任务特定模型、预训练语言模型、训练小型任务特定、任务特定模型、语言模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 17 pages, 8 figures, 12 tabels

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Data generation-based zero-shot learning, although effective in training Small Task-specific Models (STMs) via synthetic datasets generated by Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs), is often limited by the low quality of such synthetic datasets. Previous solutions have primarily focused on single PLM settings, where synthetic datasets are typically restricted to specific sub-spaces and often deviate from real-world distributions, leading to severe distribution bias. To mitigate such bias, we propose FuseGen, a novel data generation-based zero-shot learning framework that introduces a new criteria for subset selection from synthetic datasets via utilizing multiple PLMs and trained STMs. The chosen subset provides in-context feedback to each PLM, enhancing dataset quality through iterative data generation. Trained STMs are then used for sample re-weighting as well, further improving data quality. Extensive experiments across diverse tasks demonstrate that FuseGen substantially outperforms existing methods, highly effective in boosting STM performance in a PLM-agnostic way. Code is provided in this https URL.
摘要：基于数据生成的零射击学习虽然能有效地通过预先训练的语言模型(PLM)生成的合成数据集来训练小的任务特定模型(STM)，但通常受到此类合成数据集质量较低的限制。以前的解决方案主要集中在单一的PLM设置上，其中合成数据集通常限于特定的子空间，并且经常偏离真实世界的分布，导致严重的分布偏差。为了缓解这种偏差，我们提出了一种新的基于数据生成的零射击学习框架FuseGen，它通过利用多个PLM和训练的STM从合成数据集中引入了一个新的子集选择标准。所选择的子集向每个PLM提供上下文中的反馈，通过迭代数据生成来提高数据集质量。然后，训练好的STM也被用于样本的重新加权，进一步提高了数据质量。跨不同任务的广泛实验表明，FuseGen的性能大大优于现有方法，在以与PLM无关的方式提高STM性能方面非常有效。此HTTPS URL中提供了代码。

[NLP-56] Code-Optimise: Self-Generated Preference Data for Correctness and Efficiency
[NLP-56] 代码优化：自我生成的正确性和效率偏好数据

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12502
作者: Leonidas Gee,Milan Gritta,Gerasimos Lampouras,Ignacio Iacobacci
关键词: Code Language Models, Code Language, generate accurate solutions, Language Models, trained to generate
中文关键词: 代码语言模型，代码语言，生成准确的解决方案，语言模型，经过培训生成
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Under review at ARR (for EMNLP 2024)

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Code Language Models have been trained to generate accurate solutions, typically with no regard for runtime. On the other hand, previous works that explored execution optimisation have observed corresponding drops in functional correctness. To that end, we introduce Code-Optimise, a framework that incorporates both correctness (passed, failed) and runtime (quick, slow) as learning signals via self-generated preference data. Our framework is both lightweight and robust as it dynamically selects solutions to reduce overfitting while avoiding a reliance on larger models for learning signals. Code-Optimise achieves significant improvements in pass@k while decreasing the competitive baseline runtimes by an additional 6% for in-domain data and up to 3% for out-of-domain data. As a byproduct, the average length of the generated solutions is reduced by up to 48% on MBPP and 23% on HumanEval, resulting in faster and cheaper inference. The generated data and codebase will be open-sourced at www.open-source.link.
摘要：代码语言模型已经过训练，以生成准确的解决方案，通常不考虑运行时。另一方面，以前探索执行优化的工作已经观察到功能正确性的相应下降。为此，我们引入了Code-Optimise，这是一个通过自生成的偏好数据将正确性(通过、失败)和运行时(快速、缓慢)合并为学习信号的框架。我们的框架是轻量级和健壮的，因为它动态地选择解决方案来减少过度匹配，同时避免依赖更大的模型来学习信号。代码优化实现了PASS@k的显著改进，同时域内数据的竞争基准运行时间额外减少了6%，域外数据的竞争基准运行时间减少了3%。作为副产品，MBPP生成的解的平均长度在MBPP上减少了高达48%，在Human Eval上减少了23%，从而实现了更快、更便宜的推理。生成的数据和代码库将在www.Open-Sourcee.link上开源。

[NLP-57] LightPAL: Lightweight Passage Retrieval for Open Domain Multi-Document Summarization
[NLP-57] LightPAL：开放领域多文档摘要的轻量级段落检索

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12494
作者: Masafumi Enomoto,Kunihiro Takeoka,Kosuke Akimoto,Kiril Gashteovski,Masafumi Oyamada
关键词: Open-Domain Multi-Document Summarization, addressing diverse information, synthesizing relevant content, Multi-Document Summarization, Open-Domain Multi-Document
中文关键词: 开放领域多文档摘要，处理多样化信息，合成相关内容，多文档摘要，开放领域多文档
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 13 pages, 3 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Open-Domain Multi-Document Summarization (ODMDS) is crucial for addressing diverse information needs, which aims to generate a summary as answer to user’s query, synthesizing relevant content from multiple documents in a large collection. Existing approaches that first find relevant passages and then generate a summary using a language model are inadequate for ODMDS. This is because open-ended queries often require additional context for the retrieved passages to cover the topic comprehensively, making it challenging to retrieve all relevant passages initially. While iterative retrieval methods have been explored for multi-hop question answering (MQA), they are impractical for ODMDS due to high latency from repeated large language model (LLM) inference for reasoning. To address this issue, we propose LightPAL, a lightweight passage retrieval method for ODMDS that constructs a graph representing passage relationships using an LLM during indexing and employs random walk instead of iterative reasoning and retrieval at inference time. Experiments on ODMDS benchmarks show that LightPAL outperforms baseline retrievers in summary quality while being significantly more efficient than an iterative MQA approach.
摘要：开放领域多文档摘要(ODMDS)是解决不同信息需求的关键，它的目标是生成摘要作为对用户查询的回答，将多个文档中的相关内容综合在一个大型集合中。现有的方法首先找到相关段落，然后使用语言模型生成摘要，这对于ODMDS来说是不够的。这是因为开放式查询通常需要为检索到的段落提供额外的上下文才能全面涵盖该主题，这使得最初检索所有相关段落具有挑战性。虽然已经探索了用于多跳问答(MQA)的迭代检索方法，但由于重复的大语言模型(LLM)推理的高延迟，这些方法对于ODMDS是不切实际的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种轻量级的面向ODMDS的段落检索方法LightPAL，它在索引过程中使用LLM构造表示段落关系的图，并在推理时使用随机游走来代替迭代推理和检索。在ODMDS基准测试上的实验表明，LightPAL在摘要质量上优于基线检索器，同时显著高于迭代MQA方法。

[NLP-58] he Power of LLM-Generated Synthetic Data for Stance Detection in Online Political Discussions
[NLP-58] LLM生成的合成数据用于在线政治讨论中的立场检测的力量

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12480
作者: Stefan Sylvius Wagner,Maike Behrendt,Marc Ziegele,Stefan Harmeling
关键词: evaluating opinion distributions, holds great potential, online political discussions, Stance detection, detection holds great
中文关键词: 评估意见分布，潜力巨大，在线政治讨论，立场检测，检测很大
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Stance detection holds great potential for enhancing the quality of online political discussions, as it has shown to be useful for summarizing discussions, detecting misinformation, and evaluating opinion distributions. Usually, transformer-based models are used directly for stance detection, which require large amounts of data. However, the broad range of debate questions in online political discussion creates a variety of possible scenarios that the model is faced with and thus makes data acquisition for model training difficult. In this work, we show how to leverage LLM-generated synthetic data to train and improve stance detection agents for online political discussions:(i) We generate synthetic data for specific debate questions by prompting a Mistral-7B model and show that fine-tuning with the generated synthetic data can substantially improve the performance of stance detection. (ii) We examine the impact of combining synthetic data with the most informative samples from an unlabelled dataset. First, we use the synthetic data to select the most informative samples, second, we combine both these samples and the synthetic data for fine-tuning. This approach reduces labelling effort and consistently surpasses the performance of the baseline model that is trained with fully labeled data. Overall, we show in comprehensive experiments that LLM-generated data greatly improves stance detection performance for online political discussions.
摘要：立场检测在提高在线政治讨论质量方面具有巨大的潜力，因为它被证明有助于总结讨论、检测错误信息和评估观点分布。通常，基于变压器的模型直接用于姿态检测，这需要大量的数据。然而，在线政治讨论中广泛的辩论问题创造了模型面临的各种可能情景，从而使得模型训练的数据获取变得困难。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何利用LLM生成的合成数据来训练和改进用于在线政治讨论的姿态检测代理：(I)我们通过提示Mistral-7B模型为特定辩论问题生成合成数据，并表明使用生成的合成数据进行微调可以显著提高姿态检测的性能。(2)我们考察了将合成数据与来自未标记数据集的最具信息量的样本相结合的影响。首先，我们使用合成数据来选择信息量最大的样本，其次，我们将这些样本与合成数据结合起来进行微调。这种方法减少了标记的工作量，并且始终超过了用完全标记的数据训练的基线模型的性能。总体而言，我们在全面的实验中表明，LLM生成的数据极大地提高了在线政治讨论的立场检测性能。

[NLP-59] Exploring Intra and Inter-language Consistency in Embeddings with ICA
[NLP-59] 探讨ICA嵌入中语言内和语言间一致性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12474
作者: Rongzhi Li,Takeru Matsuda,Hitomi Yanaka
关键词: Word embeddings represent, embeddings represent words, multidimensional real vectors, facilitating data analysis, Word embeddings
中文关键词: 词嵌入表示，嵌入表示词，多维实载体，促进数据分析，词嵌入
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Methodology (stat.ME)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Word embeddings represent words as multidimensional real vectors, facilitating data analysis and processing, but are often challenging to interpret. Independent Component Analysis (ICA) creates clearer semantic axes by identifying independent key features. Previous research has shown ICA’s potential to reveal universal semantic axes across languages. However, it lacked verification of the consistency of independent components within and across languages. We investigated the consistency of semantic axes in two ways: both within a single language and across multiple languages. We first probed into intra-language consistency, focusing on the reproducibility of axes by performing ICA multiple times and clustering the outcomes. Then, we statistically examined inter-language consistency by verifying those axes’ correspondences using statistical tests. We newly applied statistical methods to establish a robust framework that ensures the reliability and universality of semantic axes.
摘要：单词嵌入将单词表示为多维实载体，有助于数据分析和处理，但通常难以解释。独立成分分析（ICA）通过识别独立的关键特征来创建更清晰的语义轴。之前的研究表明ICA有潜力揭示跨语言的通用语义轴。然而，它缺乏对语言内部和跨语言独立组件一致性的验证。我们通过两种方式研究了语义轴的一致性：在单一语言内和跨多种语言。我们首先探讨了语言内一致性，重点关注通过多次执行ICA并对结果进行集群来关注轴的可重复性。然后，我们通过使用统计测试验证这些轴的对应关系，对语言间的一致性进行统计检查。我们新应用统计方法来建立一个强大的框架，以确保语义轴的可靠性和通用性。

[NLP-60] Fighting Randomness with Randomness: Mitigating Optimisation Instability of Fine-Tuning using Delayed Ensemble and Noisy Interpolation
[NLP-60] 用随机性对抗随机性：使用延迟累积和有噪插值缓解微调的优化不稳定性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12471
作者: Branislav Pecher,Jan Cegin,Robert Belanec,Jakub Simko,Ivan Srba,Maria Bielikova
关键词: pre-trained language models, language models generally, displays model performance, labelled training samples, pre-trained language
中文关键词: 预训练的语言模型（通常是语言模型）显示模型性能、标记的训练样本、预训练的语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:While fine-tuning of pre-trained language models generally helps to overcome the lack of labelled training samples, it also displays model performance instability. This instability mainly originates from randomness in initialisation or data shuffling. To address this, researchers either modify the training process or augment the available samples, which typically results in increased computational costs. We propose a new mitigation strategy, called Delayed Ensemble with Noisy Interpolation (DENI), that leverages the strengths of ensembling, noise regularisation and model interpolation, while retaining computational efficiency. We compare DENI with 9 representative mitigation strategies across 3 models, 4 tuning strategies and 7 text classification datasets. We show that: 1) DENI outperforms the best performing mitigation strategy (Ensemble), while using only a fraction of its cost; 2) the mitigation strategies are beneficial for parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods, outperforming full fine-tuning in specific cases; and 3) combining DENI with data augmentation often leads to even more effective instability mitigation.
摘要：虽然对预先训练的语言模型进行微调通常有助于克服缺乏标记训练样本的问题，但它也显示出模型性能的不稳定性。这种不稳定性主要源于初始化或数据洗牌中的随机性。为了解决这个问题，研究人员要么修改训练过程，要么增加可用的样本，这通常会导致计算成本增加。我们提出了一种新的缓解策略，称为带噪声内插的延迟集成(DENI)，该策略利用了集成、噪声正则化和模型内插的优点，同时保持了计算效率。我们在3个模型、4个调优策略和7个文本分类数据集上将DENI与9种有代表性的缓解策略进行了比较。我们发现：1)DENI的性能优于最好的缓解策略(集成)，而使用的代价仅为其的一小部分；2)缓解策略有利于参数高效微调(PEFT)方法，在特定情况下优于完全微调；3)将DENI与数据增强相结合通常会导致更有效的不稳定缓解。

[NLP-61] Adaptive Token Biaser: Knowledge Editing via Biasing Key Entities
[NLP-61] 自适应代币偏置器：通过偏置关键实体进行知识编辑

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12468
作者: Baolong Bi,Shenghua Liu,Yiwei Wang,Lingrui Mei,Hongcheng Gao,Yilong Xu,Xueqi Cheng
关键词: large language models, outdated quickly, memorized by large, large language, ICE
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，很快过时，被大型语言记住，ICE
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The parametric knowledge memorized by large language models (LLMs) becomes outdated quickly. In-context editing (ICE) is currently the most effective method for updating the knowledge of LLMs. Recent advancements involve enhancing ICE by modifying the decoding strategy, obviating the need for altering internal model structures or adjusting external prompts. However, this enhancement operates across the entire sequence generation, encompassing a plethora of non-critical tokens. In this work, we introduce \textbfA daptive \textbfT oken \textbfBias er ( \textbfATBias ), a new decoding technique designed to enhance ICE. It focuses on the tokens that are mostly related to knowledge during decoding, biasing their logits by matching key entities related to new and parametric knowledge. Experimental results show that ATBias significantly enhances ICE performance, achieving up to a 32.3% improvement over state-of-the-art ICE methods while incurring only half the latency. ATBias not only improves the knowledge editing capabilities of ICE but can also be widely applied to LLMs with negligible cost.
摘要：大型语言模型所记忆的参数知识很快就会过时。情境编辑(ICE)是目前更新LLMS知识的最有效方法。最近的进展包括通过修改解码策略来增强ICE，消除了改变内部模型结构或调整外部提示的需要。然而，这种增强跨整个序列生成运行，包括过多的非关键令牌。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种新的译码技术，它是为增强ICE而设计的一种新的解码技术。它聚焦于解码过程中与知识最相关的标记，通过匹配与新知识和参数知识相关的关键实体来偏向它们的日志。实验结果表明，ATBias显著提高了ICE的性能，与最先进的ICE方法相比，性能提高了32.3%，而延迟只有现有方法的一半。ATBias不仅提高了ICE的知识编辑能力，而且可以以微不足道的代价广泛应用于LLMS。

[NLP-62] Abstraction-of-Thought Makes Language Models Better Reasoners
[NLP-62] 思想抽象使语言模型成为更好的推理器

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12442
作者: Ruixin Hong,Hongming Zhang,Xiaoman Pan,Dong Yu,Changshui Zhang
关键词: ability to reason, key to generalization, generalization in human, reasoning, AoT
中文关键词: 推理能力，概括的关键，人类的概括，推理，AoT
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: Work in Process

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Abstract reasoning, the ability to reason from the abstract essence of a problem, serves as a key to generalization in human reasoning. However, eliciting language models to perform reasoning with abstraction remains unexplored. This paper seeks to bridge this gap by introducing a novel structured reasoning format called Abstraction-of-Thought (AoT). The uniqueness of AoT lies in its explicit requirement for varying levels of abstraction within the reasoning process. This approach could elicit language models to first contemplate on the abstract level before incorporating concrete details, which is overlooked by the prevailing step-by-step Chain-of-Thought (CoT) method. To align models with the AoT format, we present AoT Collection, a generic finetuning dataset consisting of 348k high-quality samples with AoT reasoning processes, collected via an automated and scalable pipeline. We finetune a wide range of language models with AoT Collection and conduct extensive evaluations on 23 unseen tasks from the challenging benchmark Big-Bench Hard. Experimental results indicate that models aligned to AoT reasoning format substantially outperform those aligned to CoT in many reasoning tasks.
摘要：抽象推理是从问题的抽象本质中进行推理的能力，是人类推理泛化的关键。然而，引出语言模型来执行抽象推理仍未被探索。本文试图通过引入一种名为抽象思维(AoT)的新型结构化推理格式来弥合这一差距。AoT的独特性在于它对推理过程中不同级别的抽象有明确的要求。这种方法可能会促使语言模型在纳入具体细节之前首先在抽象层面进行思考，而这一点被流行的循序渐进的思想链(COT)方法忽视了。为了使模型与AoT格式保持一致，我们提出了AoT Collection，这是一个通用的精调数据集，由348k个具有AoT推理过程的高质量样本组成，通过自动化和可扩展的管道收集。我们使用AoT Collection对各种语言模型进行了微调，并对具有挑战性的基准Big-Back Hard中的23项看不见的任务进行了广泛的评估。实验结果表明，在许多推理任务中，与AoT推理格式一致的模型显著优于与COT一致的模型。

[NLP-63] PlanRAG: A Plan-then-Retrieval Augmented Generation for Generative Large Language Models as Decision Makers
[NLP-63] PlanRAG：作为决策者的生成性大型语言模型的先计划后检索增强生成

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12430
作者: Myeonghwa Lee,Seonho An,Min-Soo Kim
关键词: requires complex data, decision, conduct a study, study to utilize, utilize LLMs
中文关键词: 需要复杂的数据、决策、进行研究、研究利用、利用LLM
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: NAACL 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In this paper, we conduct a study to utilize LLMs as a solution for decision making that requires complex data analysis. We define Decision QA as the task of answering the best decision, d_best , for a decision-making question Q , business rules R and a database D . Since there is no benchmark that can examine Decision QA, we propose Decision QA benchmark, DQA. It has two scenarios, Locating and Building, constructed from two video games (Europa Universalis IV and Victoria 3) that have almost the same goal as Decision QA. To address Decision QA effectively, we also propose a new RAG technique called the iterative plan-then-retrieval augmented generation (PlanRAG). Our PlanRAG-based LM generates the plan for decision making as the first step, and the retriever generates the queries for data analysis as the second step. The proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art iterative RAG method by 15.8% in the Locating scenario and by 7.4% in the Building scenario, respectively. We release our code and benchmark at this https URL.
摘要：在本文中，我们研究了将LLMS作为一种解决需要复杂数据分析的决策问题的方法。我们将决策QA定义为回答决策问题Q、业务规则R和数据库D的最佳决策d_Best的任务。由于没有能够检验决策QA的基准，我们提出了决策QA基准DQA。它有两个场景，定位和建筑，由两个视频游戏(欧罗巴宇宙4和维多利亚3)构建，这两个游戏的目标几乎与决策QA相同。为了有效地解决决策QA问题，我们还提出了一种新的RAG技术，称为迭代计划然后检索增强生成(PlanRAG)。我们基于PlanRAG的LM生成决策计划作为第一步，检索器生成查询用于数据分析作为第二步。在定位场景和建筑场景中，该方法的性能分别比最新的迭代RAG方法高15.8%和7.4%。我们在此HTTPS URL发布代码和基准测试。

[NLP-64] PSLM: Parallel Generation of Text and Speech with LLMs for Low-Latency Spoken Dialogue Systems
[NLP-64] PSLM：针对低延迟口语对话系统的LLM并行生成文本和语音

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12428
作者: Kentaro Mitsui,Koh Mitsuda,Toshiaki Wakatsuki,Yukiya Hono,Kei Sawada
关键词: Multimodal language models, spoken dialogue systems, Multimodal language, dialogue systems, potential for applications
中文关键词: 多模式语言模型，口语对话系统，多模式语言，对话系统，应用潜力
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG); Sound (cs.SD); Audio and Speech Processing (eess.AS)
备注: 8 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables, demo samples: this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Multimodal language models that process both text and speech have a potential for applications in spoken dialogue systems. However, current models face two major challenges in response generation latency: (1) generating a spoken response requires the prior generation of a written response, and (2) speech sequences are significantly longer than text sequences. This study addresses these issues by extending the input and output sequences of the language model to support the parallel generation of text and speech. Our experiments on spoken question answering tasks demonstrate that our approach improves latency while maintaining the quality of response content. Additionally, we show that latency can be further reduced by generating speech in multiple sequences. Demo samples are available at this https URL.
摘要：同时处理文本和语音的多模式语言模型具有在口语对话系统中应用的潜力。然而，当前模型在响应生成延迟方面面临着两个主要挑战：（1）生成口头响应需要先生成书面响应，以及（2）语音序列明显比文本序列长。本研究通过扩展语言模型的输入和输出序列来支持文本和语音的并行生成来解决这些问题。我们对口语问答任务的实验表明，我们的方法可以改善延迟，同时保持响应内容的质量。此外，我们还表明，通过以多个序列生成语音可以进一步减少延迟。演示示例可在此httpsURL中获取。

[NLP-65] Open-Source Web Service with Morphological Dictionary-Supplemented Deep Learning for Morphosyntactic Analysis of Czech
[NLP-65] 具有形态词典补充深度学习的开源Web服务用于捷克语形态语法分析

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12422
作者: Milan Straka,Jana Straková
关键词: deep learning model, https URL, Czech morphosyntactic analysis, deep learning, learning model
中文关键词: 深度学习模型、https URL、捷克形态语法分析、深度学习、学习模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Accepted to TSD 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We present an open-source web service for Czech morphosyntactic analysis. The system combines a deep learning model with rescoring by a high-precision morphological dictionary at inference time. We show that our hybrid method surpasses two competitive baselines: While the deep learning model ensures generalization for out-of-vocabulary words and better disambiguation, an improvement over an existing morphological analyser MorphoDiTa, at the same time, the deep learning model benefits from inference-time guidance of a manually curated morphological dictionary. We achieve 50% error reduction in lemmatization and 58% error reduction in POS tagging over MorphoDiTa, while also offering dependency parsing. The model is trained on one of the currently largest Czech morphosyntactic corpora, the PDT-C 1.0, with the trained models available at this https URL. We provide the tool as a web service deployed at this https URL. The source code is available at GitHub (this https URL), along with a Python client for a simple use. The documentation for the models can be found at this https URL.
摘要：我们提出了一个用于捷克语词形合成分析的开源Web服务。该系统在推理时结合了深度学习模型和高精度形态词典的检索。我们的混合方法超过了两条竞争基线：深度学习模型确保了对词汇表外单词的泛化和更好的歧义消除，比现有的形态分析器Morphy DiTa有了改进，同时，深度学习模型得益于人工挑选的形态词典的推理时间指导。该算法在词汇化和词性标注上分别降低了50%的错误和58%的错误，同时还提供了依存关系分析。该模型是在目前捷克最大的形态句法语料库之一–PDT-C 1.0上进行训练的，训练后的模型可以在这个HTTPS URL上找到。我们将该工具作为部署在此HTTPS URL上的Web服务提供。GitHub提供了源代码(这是一个HTTPS URL)，还有一个简单使用的Python客户端。模型的文档可以在此HTTPS URL中找到。

[NLP-66] MMUTF: Multimodal Multimedia Event Argument Extraction with Unified Template Filling
[NLP-66] MMUTF：具有统一模板填充的多模式多媒体事件参数提取

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12420
作者: Philipp Seeberger,Dominik Wagner,Korbinian Riedhammer
关键词: Event Argument Extraction, increasingly important challenge, Multimedia Event Extraction, making Multimedia Event, challenging Event Argument
中文关键词: 事件论点提取，越来越重要的挑战，多媒体事件提取，制作多媒体事件，挑战事件论点
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:With the advancement of multimedia technologies, news documents and user-generated content are often represented as multiple modalities, making Multimedia Event Extraction (MEE) an increasingly important challenge. However, recent MEE methods employ weak alignment strategies and data augmentation with simple classification models, which ignore the capabilities of natural language-formulated event templates for the challenging Event Argument Extraction (EAE) task. In this work, we focus on EAE and address this issue by introducing a unified template filling model that connects the textual and visual modalities via textual prompts. This approach enables the exploitation of cross-ontology transfer and the incorporation of event-specific semantics. Experiments on the M2E2 benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. Our system surpasses the current SOTA on textual EAE by +7% F1, and performs generally better than the second-best systems for multimedia EAE.
摘要：随着多媒体技术的进步，新闻文档和用户生成的内容通常被表示为多种形式，使得多媒体事件提取（NPS）成为越来越重要的挑战。然而，最近的收件箱方法采用弱对齐策略和简单分类模型的数据增强，这忽视了自然语言制定的事件模板对于具有挑战性的事件参数提取（EAE）任务的能力。在这项工作中，我们重点关注EAE，并通过引入统一的模板填充模型来解决这个问题，该模型通过文本提示连接文本和视觉模式。这种方法使得能够利用跨本体转移并结合特定于事件的语义。M2 E2基准测试的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。我们的系统在文本EAE上比当前的SOTA高出7% F1，并且总体上比多媒体EAE的第二佳系统更好。

[NLP-67] AI-Assisted Human Evaluation of Machine Translation
[NLP-67] 人工智能辅助机器翻译的人类评估

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12419
作者: Vilém Zouhar,Tom Kocmi,Mrinmaya Sachan
关键词: research teams spend, teams spend large, spend large amounts, machine translation systems, inter alia
中文关键词: 研究团队花费，团队花费大量，花费大量，机器翻译系统等
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Annually, research teams spend large amounts of money to evaluate the quality of machine translation systems (WMT, inter alia). This is expensive because it requires detailed human labor. The recently proposed annotation protocol, Error Span Annotation (ESA), has annotators marking erroneous parts of the translation. In our work, we help the annotators by pre-filling the span annotations with automatic quality estimation. With AI assistance, we obtain more detailed annotations while cutting down the time per span annotation by half (71s/error span \rightarrow 31s/error span). The biggest advantage of ESA ^\mathrmAI protocol is an accurate priming of annotators (pre-filled error spans) before they assign the final score as opposed to starting from scratch. In addition, the annotation budget can be reduced by up to 24% with filtering of examples that the AI deems to be very likely to be correct.
摘要：研究团队每年都会花费大量资金来评估机器翻译系统（WMT等）的质量。这很昂贵，因为它需要细致的人力。最近提出的注释协议错误跨度注释（ESA）具有标记翻译错误部分的注释器。在我们的工作中，我们通过用自动质量估计预填充跨度注释来帮助注释者。在人工智能的帮助下，我们可以获得更详细的注释，同时将每个跨度注释的时间缩短一半（71秒/错误跨度\rightarrow 31秒/错误跨度）。ESA ’ mathrmAI协议的最大优势是在注释器（预填充的错误范围）分配最终分数之前准确启动，而不是从头开始。此外，通过过滤人工智能认为很可能正确的示例，注释预算可以减少高达24%。

[NLP-68] Beyond Under-Alignment: Atomic Preference Enhanced Factuality Tuning for Large Language Models
[NLP-68] 超越欠对齐：原子偏好增强大型语言模型的事实调优

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12416
作者: Hongbang Yuan,Yubo Chen,Pengfei Cao,Zhuoran Jin,Kang Liu,Jun Zhao
关键词: Large language models, factually erroneous responses, achieved remarkable success, generate factually erroneous, Large language
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，事实上错误的响应，取得了显着的成功，生成事实上错误的，大型语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success but still tend to generate factually erroneous responses, a phenomenon known as hallucination. A recent trend is to use preference learning to fine-tune models to align with factuality. However, existing work primarily evaluates fine-tuned models on in-domain (ID) datasets and the factuality on out-of-domain (OOD) datasets remains underexplored. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of the factuality of different models tuned by various preference learning algorithms and demonstrate that their performance on OOD datasets either increases minimally or decreases. Subsequently, we reveal that the main cause of model’s failure to uphold factuality under a distribution shift is \textbfunder-alignment, rather than \textbfover-alignment, by analyzing the token distribution shift of the models before and after tuning. Finally, we propose \textbfAPEFT (\textbfAtomic \textbfPreference \textbfEnhanced \textbfFactuality \textbfTuning), a framework that enhances model’s awareness of factuality at the granularity of individual facts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that APEFT improves model performance by an average of \boldsymbol3.45% on both ID and OOD datasets, which is highly effective.
摘要：大型语言模型已经取得了显著的成功，但仍然容易产生事实错误的反应，这种现象被称为幻觉。最近的一个趋势是使用偏好学习来微调模型，使之与事实保持一致。然而，现有的工作主要是在域内(ID)数据集上评估微调的模型，而在域外(OOD)数据集上的真实性仍未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们对不同偏好学习算法调整的不同模型的真实性进行了综合评估，并证明了它们在面向对象数据集上的性能要么略有提高，要么有所下降。随后，我们通过分析模型在调整前后的令牌分布移动，揭示了模型在分布漂移下不能保持真实性的主要原因是\extbFunder对齐而不是\extbfover对齐。最后，我们提出了一种在单个事实的粒度上增强模型的真实性意识的框架–\textbfATOM\extbfPference\extbf Enhanced\extbfFactuality\extbfTuning。大量实验表明，APEFT在ID和OOD数据集上的模型性能平均提高了3.45%，这是非常有效的。

[NLP-69] PDSS: A Privacy-Preserving Framework for Step-by-Step Distillation of Large Language Models
[NLP-69] PDSS：一个用于逐步提炼大型语言模型的隐私保护框架

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12403
作者: Tao Fan,Yan Kang,Weijing Chen,Hanlin Gu,Yuanfeng Song,Lixin Fan,Kai Chen,Qiang Yang
关键词: leveraging large language, domain-specific knowledge privacy, large language models, domain-specific knowledge, real-world applications
中文关键词: 利用大型语言、特定领域知识隐私、大型语言模型、特定领域知识、现实世界应用程序
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In the context of real-world applications, leveraging large language models (LLMs) for domain-specific tasks often faces two major challenges: domain-specific knowledge privacy and constrained resources. To address these issues, we propose PDSS, a privacy-preserving framework for step-by-step distillation of LLMs. PDSS works on a server-client architecture, wherein client transmits perturbed prompts to the server’s LLM for rationale generation. The generated rationales are then decoded by the client and used to enrich the training of task-specific small language model(SLM) within a multi-task learning paradigm. PDSS introduces two privacy protection strategies: the Exponential Mechanism Strategy and the Encoder-Decoder Strategy, balancing prompt privacy and rationale usability. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of PDSS in various text generation tasks, enabling the training of task-specific SLM with enhanced performance while prioritizing data privacy protection.
摘要：在现实世界应用程序的背景下，利用大型语言模型（LLM）进行特定领域的任务通常面临两个主要挑战：特定领域的知识隐私和受限制的资源。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了PDSS，这是一个用于逐步提炼LLM的隐私保护框架。PDSS工作在服务器-客户端架构上，其中客户端将扰动的提示传输到服务器的LLM以生成理由。然后，客户端对生成的原理进行解码，并用于丰富多任务学习范式中任务特定小语言模型（LAM）的训练。PDSS引入了两种隐私保护策略：指数机制策略和编码器-解码器策略，平衡提示隐私和合理可用性。实验证明了PDSS在各种文本生成任务中的有效性，可以以更高的性能训练特定于任务的LAM，同时优先考虑数据隐私保护。

[NLP-70] Flee the Flaw: Annotating the Underlying Logic of Fallacious Arguments Through Templates and Slot-filling
[NLP-70] 逃离缺陷：通过模板和填补空位诠释谬误论点的潜在逻辑

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12402
作者: Irfan Robbani(1),Paul Reisert(2),Naoya Inoue(1,3),Surawat Pothong(1),Camélia Guerraoui(4,3,5),Wenzhi Wang(4,3),Shoichi Naito(6,4,3),Jungmin Choi(3),Kentaro Inui(7,4,3) ((1) JAIST, (2) Beyond Reason, (3) RIKEN, (4) Tohoku University, (5) INSA Lyon, (6) Ricoh Company, Ltd., (7) MBZUAI)
关键词: explicating logical errors, Prior research, computational argumentation, focused on scoring, scoring the quality
中文关键词: 解释逻辑错误，前期研究，计算论证，专注于评分，评分质量
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Prior research in computational argumentation has mainly focused on scoring the quality of arguments, with less attention on explicating logical errors. In this work, we introduce four sets of explainable templates for common informal logical fallacies designed to explicate a fallacy’s implicit logic. Using our templates, we conduct an annotation study on top of 400 fallacious arguments taken from LOGIC dataset and achieve a high agreement score (Krippendorf’s alpha of 0.54) and reasonable coverage (0.83). Finally, we conduct an experiment for detecting the structure of fallacies and discover that state-of-the-art language models struggle with detecting fallacy templates (0.47 accuracy). To facilitate research on fallacies, we make our dataset and guidelines publicly available.
摘要：先前对计算论证的研究主要集中在评分论证的质量，较少关注解释逻辑错误。在这项工作中，我们介绍了常见非正式逻辑谬误的四组可解释模板，旨在解释谬误的隐含逻辑。使用我们的模板，我们对来自LOGIC数据集的400个错误论点进行了注释研究，并获得了很高的一致性分数（Krippendorf的Alpha为0.54）和合理的覆盖率（0.83）。最后，我们进行了一项检测谬误结构的实验，发现最先进的语言模型在检测谬误模板方面遇到了困难（准确率为0.47）。为了促进对谬误的研究，我们公开了我们的数据集和指南。

[NLP-71] QueerBench: Quantifying Discrimination in Language Models Toward Queer Identities
[NLP-71] QueerBench：量化语言模型中对酷儿身份的歧视

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12399
作者: Mae Sosto,Alberto Barrón-Cedeño
关键词: Natural Language Processing, role of Natural, Language Processing, Natural Language, challenges concerning bias
中文关键词: 自然语言处理、自然的作用、语言处理、自然语言、有关偏见的挑战
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computers and Society (cs.CY)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:With the increasing role of Natural Language Processing (NLP) in various applications, challenges concerning bias and stereotype perpetuation are accentuated, which often leads to hate speech and harm. Despite existing studies on sexism and misogyny, issues like homophobia and transphobia remain underexplored and often adopt binary perspectives, putting the safety of LGBTQIA+ individuals at high risk in online spaces. In this paper, we assess the potential harm caused by sentence completions generated by English large language models (LLMs) concerning LGBTQIA+ individuals. This is achieved using QueerBench, our new assessment framework, which employs a template-based approach and a Masked Language Modeling (MLM) task. The analysis indicates that large language models tend to exhibit discriminatory behaviour more frequently towards individuals within the LGBTQIA+ community, reaching a difference gap of 7.2% in the QueerBench score of harmfulness.
摘要：随着自然语言处理（NLP）在各种应用中的作用越来越大，有关偏见和刻板印象延续的挑战变得更加突出，这往往会导致仇恨言论和伤害。尽管已有关于性别歧视和厌女症的研究，但恐同症和跨性别恐惧症等问题仍然没有得到充分的研究，并且经常采取二元观点，从而使LGBTQIA+个人的安全在网络空间面临高风险。在本文中，我们评估了英语大型语言模型（LLM）生成的涉及LGBTQIA+个人的句子完成所造成的潜在危害。这是使用QueerBench来实现的，QueerBench是我们的新评估框架，该框架采用基于模板的方法和掩蔽语言建模（MLM）任务。分析表明，大型语言模型往往更频繁地对LGBTQIA+社区内的个人表现出歧视行为，QueerBench危害性评分的差异差距为7.2%。

[NLP-72] Unveiling the Flaws: Exploring Imperfections in Synthetic Data and Mitigation Strategies for Large Language Models
[NLP-72] 揭开缺陷：探索合成数据中的缺陷和大型语言模型的缓解策略

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12397
作者: Jie Chen,Yupeng Zhang,Bingning Wang,Wayne Xin Zhao,Ji-Rong Wen,Weipeng Chen
关键词: Synthetic data, high-quality data scarcity, large language models, Synthetic, solution to address
中文关键词: 合成数据、高质量数据稀缺、大型语言模型、合成、解决方案
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 15 pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Synthetic data has been proposed as a solution to address the issue of high-quality data scarcity in the training of large language models (LLMs). Studies have shown that synthetic data can effectively improve the performance of LLMs on downstream benchmarks. However, despite its potential benefits, our analysis suggests that there may be inherent flaws in synthetic data. The uniform format of synthetic data can lead to pattern overfitting and cause significant shifts in the output distribution, thereby reducing the model’s instruction-following capabilities. Our work delves into these specific flaws associated with question-answer (Q-A) pairs, a prevalent type of synthetic data, and presents a method based on unlearning techniques to mitigate these flaws. The empirical results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, which can reverse the instruction-following issues caused by pattern overfitting without compromising performance on benchmarks at relatively low cost. Our work has yielded key insights into the effective use of synthetic data, aiming to promote more robust and efficient LLM training.
摘要：合成数据已经被提出作为解决大型语言模型训练中高质量数据稀缺的问题的解决方案。研究表明，合成数据可以有效地提高LLMS在下游基准上的性能。然而，尽管它有潜在的好处，但我们的分析表明，合成数据可能存在内在缺陷。合成数据的统一格式可能会导致模式过度拟合，并导致输出分布的显著变化，从而降低模型的指令跟随能力。我们的工作深入研究了与问答(Q-A)对相关的这些特定缺陷，并提出了一种基于遗忘技术的方法来缓解这些缺陷。实验结果证明了该方法的有效性，该方法能够以相对较低的代价在不影响基准测试性能的情况下扭转模式过度匹配导致的指令跟随问题。我们的工作对有效利用合成数据产生了关键的见解，旨在促进更稳健和有效的LLM培训。

[NLP-73] EMO-KNOW: A Large Scale Dataset on Emotion and Emotion-cause
[NLP-73] EMO-KNOW：关于情绪和情感原因的大规模数据集

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12389
作者: Mia Huong Nguyen,Yasith Samaradivakara,Prasanth Sasikumar,Chitralekha Gupta,Suranga Nanayakkara
关键词: analysis has attracted, attracted the attention, attention of researchers, researchers in recent, emotion
中文关键词: 分析引起了研究人员的注意，最近研究人员的注意，情感
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Accepted to Findings of EMNLP 2023

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Emotion-Cause analysis has attracted the attention of researchers in recent years. However, most existing datasets are limited in size and number of emotion categories. They often focus on extracting parts of the document that contain the emotion cause and fail to provide more abstractive, generalizable root cause. To bridge this gap, we introduce a large-scale dataset of emotion causes, derived from 9.8 million cleaned tweets over 15 years. We describe our curation process, which includes a comprehensive pipeline for data gathering, cleaning, labeling, and validation, ensuring the dataset’s reliability and richness. We extract emotion labels and provide abstractive summarization of the events causing emotions. The final dataset comprises over 700,000 tweets with corresponding emotion-cause pairs spanning 48 emotion classes, validated by human evaluators. The novelty of our dataset stems from its broad spectrum of emotion classes and the abstractive emotion cause that facilitates the development of an emotion-cause knowledge graph for nuanced reasoning. Our dataset will enable the design of emotion-aware systems that account for the diverse emotional responses of different people for the same event.
摘要：情绪成因分析近年来引起了研究者的关注。然而，现有的大多数数据集在大小和情感类别数量上都是有限的。它们通常专注于提取文档中包含情感原因的部分，而无法提供更抽象、更概括的根本原因。为了弥补这一差距，我们引入了一个大规模的情感原因数据集，这些数据来自15年来980万条干净的推文。我们描述了我们的管理过程，其中包括用于数据收集、清理、标记和验证的全面管道，以确保数据集的可靠性和丰富性。我们提取情感标签，并提供引起情感的事件的抽象摘要。最终的数据集包括超过70万条推文，以及对应的情感原因对，跨越48个情感类别，经人类评估者验证。我们数据集的新颖性来自于它广泛的情感类别和抽象的情感原因，这有助于开发用于细微推理的情感原因知识图。我们的数据集将使情感感知系统的设计成为可能，这些系统可以解释不同人对同一事件的不同情感反应。

[NLP-74] IPEval: A Bilingual Intellectual Property Agency Consultation Evaluation Benchmark for Large Language Models
[NLP-74] IPEval：大型语言模型的双语知识产权机构咨询评估基准

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12386
作者: Qiyao Wang,Jianguo Huang,Shule Lu,Yuan Lin,Kan Xu,Liang Yang,Hongfei Lin
关键词: Large Language Models, including intellectual property, Large Language, specific evaluation benchmark, vertical domains
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，包括知识产权、大型语言、特定评估基准、垂直领域
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The rapid development of Large Language Models (LLMs) in vertical domains, including intellectual property (IP), lacks a specific evaluation benchmark for assessing their understanding, application, and reasoning abilities. To fill this gap, we introduce IPEval, the first evaluation benchmark tailored for IP agency and consulting tasks. IPEval comprises 2657 multiple-choice questions across four major dimensions: creation, application, protection, and management of IP. These questions span patent rights (inventions, utility models, designs), trademarks, copyrights, trade secrets, and other related laws. Evaluation methods include zero-shot, 5-few-shot, and Chain of Thought (CoT) for seven LLM types, predominantly in English or Chinese. Results show superior English performance by models like GPT series and Qwen series, while Chinese-centric LLMs excel in Chinese tests, albeit specialized IP LLMs lag behind general-purpose ones. Regional and temporal aspects of IP underscore the need for LLMs to grasp legal nuances and evolving laws. IPEval aims to accurately gauge LLM capabilities in IP and spur development of specialized models. Website: \urlthis https URL
摘要：大型语言模型在包括知识产权在内的垂直领域的快速发展，缺乏一个专门的评估基准来评估它们的理解、应用和推理能力。为了填补这一空白，我们引入了IPEval，这是第一个为知识产权机构和咨询任务量身定做的评估基准。IPEval包括2657个多项选择题，涉及知识产权的创造、应用、保护和管理四个主要维度。这些问题涉及专利权(发明、实用新型、外观设计)、商标、版权、商业秘密和其他相关法律。评估方法包括零射、5射和链式思维(COT)，用于七种LLM类型，主要以英语或中文为主。结果显示，GPT系列和Qwen系列等模型的英语表现优异，而以中国为中心的LLMS在中文测试中表现出色，尽管专业IP LLM落后于通用LLM。知识产权的区域和时间方面强调了小岛屿发展中国家需要掌握法律上的细微差别和不断演变的法律。IPEval的目标是准确衡量LLM在知识产权方面的能力，并推动专门型号的开发。网站：\urlThis HTTPS URL

[NLP-75] From Instance Training to Instruction Learning: Task Adapters Generation from Instructions
[NLP-75] 从实例训练到指令学习：从指令生成任务适配器

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12382
作者: Huanxuan Liao,Yao Xu,Shizhu He,Yuanzhe Zhang,Yanchao Hao,Shengping Liu,Kang Liu,Jun Zhao
关键词: Large language models, Large language, solve general tasks, acquired the ability, ability to solve
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，大型语言，解决一般任务，获得能力，解决能力
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language models (LLMs) have acquired the ability to solve general tasks by utilizing instruction finetuning (IFT). However, IFT still relies heavily on instance training of extensive task data, which greatly limits the adaptability of LLMs to real-world scenarios where labeled task instances are scarce and broader task generalization becomes paramount. Contrary to LLMs, humans acquire skills and complete tasks not merely through repeated practice but also by understanding and following instructional guidelines. This paper is dedicated to simulating human learning to address the shortcomings of instance training, focusing on instruction learning to enhance cross-task generalization. Within this context, we introduce Task Adapters Generation from Instructions (TAGI), which automatically constructs the task-specific model in a parameter generation manner based on the given task instructions without retraining for unseen tasks. Specifically, we utilize knowledge distillation to enhance the consistency between TAGI developed through Learning with Instruction and task-specific models developed through Training with Instance, by aligning the labels, output logits, and adapter parameters between them. TAGI is endowed with cross-task generalization capabilities through a two-stage training process that includes hypernetwork pretraining and finetuning. We evaluate TAGI on the Super-Natural Instructions and P3 datasets. The experimental results demonstrate that TAGI can match or even outperform traditional meta-trained models and other hypernetwork models, while significantly reducing computational requirements.
摘要：大型语言模型(LLM)通过使用指令精调(IFT)获得了解决一般任务的能力。然而，IFT仍然严重依赖于大量任务数据的实例训练，这极大地限制了LLMS对真实场景的适应性，在现实世界中，标记的任务实例稀缺，更广泛的任务泛化变得至关重要。与LLMS相反，人类不仅通过反复练习，而且通过理解和遵循教学指导方针来获得技能和完成任务。本文致力于模拟人类学习来解决实例训练的不足，重点研究指令学习来增强跨任务的泛化。在这种背景下，我们引入了从指令生成任务适配器(TAGI)，它根据给定的任务指令以参数生成的方式自动构建特定于任务的模型，而不需要为看不见的任务重新训练。具体地说，我们利用知识蒸馏来增强通过学习与指导开发的TAGI与通过与实例培训开发的任务特定模型之间的一致性，方法是对标签、输出日志和适配器参数进行调整。TAGI通过包括超网络预训练和精调的两个阶段的训练过程被赋予跨任务泛化能力。我们在超自然指令集和P3数据集上对TAGI进行了评估。实验结果表明，TAGI可以达到甚至超过传统的元训练模型和其他超网络模型的性能，同时显著降低了计算量。

[NLP-76] QOG:Question and Options Generation based on Language Model
[NLP-76] QOG：基于语言模型的问题和选项生成

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12381
作者: Jincheng Zhou
关键词: pairs given context, question-options pairs, Question-Options Generation, involves generating, generating a set
中文关键词: 给定上下文对、问题-选项对、问题-选项生成，涉及生成，生成一个集合
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: 8 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Question-Options Generation (QOG) is a task that involves generating a set of question-options pairs given context. This task has various applications, including fine-tuning large models, information retrieval, and automated multiple-choice question generation for education. In this paper, we develop QOG models using three different methods based on fine-tuning sequence-to-sequence language models (LMs). Experiments demonstrate that the end-to-end QOG model is computationally efficient and stable during both training and inference, outperforming other methods. Furthermore, our analysis indicates that our QOG models are competitive on the QOG task compared to the large language model Llama 3-8B.
摘要：问题-选项生成（QOG）是一项涉及在给定上下文的情况下生成一组问题-选项对的任务。该任务具有多种应用，包括微调大型模型、信息检索和教育自动多项选择题生成。本文中，我们基于微调序列到序列语言模型（LM），使用三种不同的方法开发QOG模型。实验表明，端到端QOG模型在训练和推理期间计算效率高且稳定，优于其他方法。此外，我们的分析表明，与大型语言模型Llama 3-8B相比，我们的QOG模型在QOG任务上具有竞争力。

[NLP-77] WebCanvas: Benchmarking Web Agents in Online Environments
[NLP-77] WebCanvas：在线环境中的Web代理基准测试

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12373
作者: Yichen Pan,Dehan Kong,Sida Zhou,Cheng Cui,Yifei Leng,Bing Jiang,Hangyu Liu,Yanyi Shang,Shuyan Zhou,Tongshuang Wu,Zhengyang Wu
关键词: continuously evolving web, interfaces and content, evolving web environment, web environment characterized, continuously evolving
中文关键词: 不断发展的网络、界面和内容、不断发展的网络环境、特征化的网络环境、不断发展
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: Our platform, tool and dataset are publically available at this https URL and this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:For web agents to be practically useful, they must adapt to the continuously evolving web environment characterized by frequent updates to user interfaces and content.
