However, most existing benchmarks only capture the static aspects of the web. To bridge this gap, we introduce WebCanvas, an innovative online evaluation framework for web agents that effectively addresses the dynamic nature of web interactions. WebCanvas contains three main components to facilitate realistic assessments: (1) A novel evaluation metric which reliably capture critical intermediate actions or states necessary for task completions while disregarding noise caused by insignificant events or changed web-elements. (2) A benchmark dataset called Mind2Web-Live, a refined version of original Mind2Web static dataset containing 542 tasks with 2439 intermediate evaluation states; (3) Lightweight and generalizable annotation tools and testing pipelines that enables the community to collect and maintain the high-quality, up-to-date dataset. Building on WebCanvas, we open-source an agent framework with extensible modules for reasoning, providing a foundation for the community to conduct online inference and evaluations. Our best-performing agent achieves a task success rate of 23.1% and a task completion rate of 48.8% on the Mind2Web-Live test set. Additionally, we analyze the performance discrepancies across various websites, domains, and experimental environments. We encourage the community to contribute further insights on online agent evaluation, thereby advancing this field of research.
摘要：为了使Web代理在实际中发挥作用，它们必须适应不断发展的Web环境，其特征是用户界面和内容的频繁更新。然而，大多数现有的基准测试只捕捉到了网络的静态方面。为了弥补这一差距，我们引入了WebCanvas，这是一个针对Web代理的创新在线评估框架，有效地解决了Web交互的动态性质。WebCanvas包含三个主要组件来促进现实评估：(1)一种新的评估度量，它可靠地捕获任务完成所需的关键中间操作或状态，而忽略不重要的事件或更改的Web元素造成的噪声。(2)名为Mind2Web-Live的基准数据集，这是原始Mind2Web静态数据集的精化版本，包含542个任务和2439个中间评估状态；(3)轻量级且可泛化的标注工具和测试管道，使社区能够收集和维护高质量的最新数据集。在WebCanvas的基础上，我们开源了一个具有可扩展推理模块的代理框架，为社区进行在线推理和评估提供了基础。我们性能最好的代理在Mind2Web-Live测试集上实现了23.1%的任务成功率和48.8%的任务完成率。此外，我们还分析了不同网站、域和实验环境之间的性能差异。我们鼓励社区对在线代理评估提供更多的见解，从而推动这一研究领域的发展。

[NLP-78] A Comparative Study of Continuous Sign Language Recognition Techniques
[NLP-78] 连续手语识别技术的比较研究

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12369
作者: Sarah Alyami,Hamzah Luqman
关键词: Continuous Sign Language, Sign Language Recognition, gestures performed continually, language gestures performed, sign language gestures
中文关键词: 连续手语、手语识别、连续执行的手势、执行的语言手势、手语手势
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication. Copyright may be transferred without notice, after which this version may no longer be accessible

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Continuous Sign Language Recognition (CSLR) focuses on the interpretation of a sequence of sign language gestures performed continually without pauses. In this study, we conduct an empirical evaluation of recent deep learning CSLR techniques and assess their performance across various datasets and sign languages. The models selected for analysis implement a range of approaches for extracting meaningful features and employ distinct training strategies. To determine their efficacy in modeling different sign languages, these models were evaluated using multiple datasets, specifically RWTH-PHOENIX-Weather-2014, ArabSign, and GrSL, each representing a unique sign language. The performance of the models was further tested with unseen signers and sentences. The conducted experiments establish new benchmarks on the selected datasets and provide valuable insights into the robustness and generalization of the evaluated techniques under challenging scenarios.
摘要：连续手语识别（CSLR）重点是解释连续执行且没有停顿的手语手势序列。在这项研究中，我们对最近的深度学习CSLR技术进行了实证评估，并评估了它们在各种数据集和手语中的性能。选择进行分析的模型实施了一系列提取有意义特征的方法，并采用了不同的训练策略。为了确定它们对不同手语建模的有效性，使用多个数据集对这些模型进行了评估，特别是RWTH-PHOENIX-Weather-2014、ArabSign和GrSL，每个数据集都代表一种独特的手语。模型的性能通过看不见的签名者和句子进行了进一步测试。所进行的实验在所选数据集上建立了新的基准，并为具有挑战性的场景下所评估技术的稳健性和概括性提供了宝贵的见解。

[NLP-79] Does Context Help Mitigate Gender Bias in Neural Machine Translation?
[NLP-79] 上下文有助于减轻神经机器翻译中的性别偏见吗？

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12364
作者: Harritxu Gete,Thierry Etchegoyhen
关键词: training data distribution, Neural Machine Translation, Neural Machine, data distribution, Translation models tend
中文关键词: 训练数据分布、神经机器翻译、神经机器、数据分布、翻译模型倾向
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Neural Machine Translation models tend to perpetuate gender bias present in their training data distribution. Context-aware models have been previously suggested as a means to mitigate this type of bias. In this work, we examine this claim by analysing in detail the translation of stereotypical professions in English to German, and translation with non-informative context in Basque to Spanish. Our results show that, although context-aware models can significantly enhance translation accuracy for feminine terms, they can still maintain or even amplify gender bias. These results highlight the need for more fine-grained approaches to bias mitigation in Neural Machine Translation.
摘要：神经机器翻译模型往往会使其训练数据分布中存在的性别偏见永久化。上下文感知模型之前曾被建议作为减轻此类偏见的一种手段。在这项工作中，我们通过详细分析英语中刻板印象职业到德语的翻译以及巴斯克语中非信息背景下的翻译到西班牙语来审查这一主张。我们的结果表明，尽管上下文感知模型可以显着提高女性术语的翻译准确性，但它们仍然可以维持甚至放大性别偏见。这些结果凸显了需要更细粒度的方法来缓解神经机器翻译中的偏差。

[NLP-80] Cross-Lingual Unlearning of Selective Knowledge in Multilingual Language Models
[NLP-80] 多语言语言模型中选择性知识的跨语言遗忘

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12354
作者: Minseok Choi,Kyunghyun Min,Jaegul Choo
关键词: raising significant safety, significant safety concerns, memorize vast amounts, Pretrained language models, models memorize vast
中文关键词: 提高重要的安全性，重大的安全问题，记忆大量，预训练的语言模型，模型记忆大量
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 15 pages, 5 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Pretrained language models memorize vast amounts of information, including private and copyrighted data, raising significant safety concerns. Retraining these models after excluding sensitive data is prohibitively expensive, making machine unlearning a viable, cost-effective alternative. Previous research has focused on machine unlearning for monolingual models, but we find that unlearning in one language does not necessarily transfer to others. This vulnerability makes models susceptible to low-resource language attacks, where sensitive information remains accessible in less dominant languages. This paper presents a pioneering approach to machine unlearning for multilingual language models, selectively erasing information across different languages while maintaining overall performance. Specifically, our method employs an adaptive unlearning scheme that assigns language-dependent weights to address different language performances of multilingual language models. Empirical results demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework compared to existing unlearning baselines, setting a new standard for secure and adaptable multilingual language models.
摘要：经过预先训练的语言模型会记住大量信息，包括私有数据和受版权保护的数据，这引发了重大的安全问题。在排除敏感数据后重新训练这些模型的成本高得令人望而却步，这使得机器遗忘成为一种可行的、具有成本效益的替代方案。以前的研究集中在单语模型的机器遗忘上，但我们发现在一种语言中的遗忘并不一定会转移到其他语言中。此漏洞使模型容易受到资源不足的语言攻击，敏感信息仍可用不太主流的语言访问。本文提出了一种开创性的多语言模型机器遗忘方法，在保持整体性能的同时，选择性地擦除不同语言之间的信息。具体地说，我们的方法采用了一种自适应遗忘机制，该机制根据语言分配权重来处理多语言模型的不同语言表现。实验结果表明，与现有的遗忘基线相比，我们的框架是有效的，为安全和自适应的多语言模型设定了一个新的标准。

[NLP-81] Interpreting Bias in Large Language Models: A Feature-Based Approach
[NLP-81] 解释大型语言模型中的偏差：基于条件的方法

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12347
作者: Nirmalendu Prakash,Lee Ka Wei Roy
关键词: Large Language Models, natural language processing, Large Language, showcased remarkable performance, Mistral and LLaMA
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、自然语言处理、大型语言、表现出色、Mistral和LLaMA
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) such as Mistral and LLaMA have showcased remarkable performance across various natural language processing (NLP) tasks. Despite their success, these models inherit social biases from the diverse datasets on which they are trained. This paper investigates the propagation of biases within LLMs through a novel feature-based analytical approach. Drawing inspiration from causal mediation analysis, we hypothesize the evolution of bias-related features and validate them using interpretability techniques like activation and attribution patching. Our contributions are threefold: (1) We introduce and empirically validate a feature-based method for bias analysis in LLMs, applied to LLaMA-2-7B, LLaMA-3-8B, and Mistral-7B-v0.3 with templates from a professions dataset. (2) We extend our method to another form of gender bias, demonstrating its generalizability. (3) We differentiate the roles of MLPs and attention heads in bias propagation and implement targeted debiasing using a counterfactual dataset. Our findings reveal the complex nature of bias in LLMs and emphasize the necessity for tailored debiasing strategies, offering a deeper understanding of bias mechanisms and pathways for effective mitigation.
摘要：大型语言模型(LLM)在各种自然语言处理(NLP)任务中表现出了显著的性能，如Mistral和Llama。尽管它们取得了成功，但这些模型继承了它们所依据的不同数据集的社会偏见。本文通过一种新的基于特征的分析方法研究了偏倚在LLMS中的传播。从因果中介分析中得到启发，我们假设了与偏见相关的特征的演变，并使用激活和归因修补等可解释性技术对其进行了验证。我们的贡献有三个方面：(1)我们介绍了一种基于特征的LLMS偏差分析方法，并以专业数据集中的模板应用于骆驼-2-7B、骆驼-3-8B和西北风-7B-v0.3，并进行了实证验证。(2)我们将我们的方法扩展到另一种形式的性别偏见，证明了它的普适性。(3)我们区分了MLP和注意头部在偏差传播中的作用，并使用反事实数据集实现了有针对性的去偏见。我们的发现揭示了LLMS中偏差的复杂性，并强调了量身定做的去偏见策略的必要性，从而为有效缓解偏差的机制和途径提供了更深入的理解。

[NLP-82] A Compass for Navigating the World of Sentence Embeddings for the Telecom Domain
[NLP-82] 导航电信领域句子嵌入世界的指南针

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12336
作者: Sujoy Roychowdhury,Sumit Soman,H. G. Ranjani,Vansh Chhabra,Neeraj Gunda,Subhadip Bandyopadhyay,Sai Krishna Bala
关键词: rich with specialized, specialized vocabulary, challenging to choose, embeddings, confidence intervals
中文关键词: 拥有丰富的专业词汇、具有挑战性的选择、嵌入、置信区间
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: 10 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables

点击查看摘要

Abstract:A plethora of sentence embedding models makes it challenging to choose one, especially for domains such as telecom, rich with specialized vocabulary. We evaluate multiple embeddings obtained from publicly available models and their domain-adapted variants, on both point retrieval accuracies as well as their (95%) confidence intervals. We establish a systematic method to obtain thresholds for similarity scores for different embeddings. We observe that fine-tuning improves mean bootstrapped accuracies as well as tightens confidence intervals. The pre-training combined with fine-tuning makes confidence intervals even tighter. To understand these variations, we analyse and report significant correlations between the distributional overlap between top- K , correct and random sentence similarities with retrieval accuracies and similarity thresholds. Following current literature, we analyze if retrieval accuracy variations can be attributed to isotropy of embeddings. Our conclusions are that isotropy of embeddings (as measured by two independent state-of-the-art isotropy metric definitions) cannot be attributed to better retrieval performance. However, domain adaptation which improves retrieval accuracies also improves isotropy. We establish that domain adaptation moves domain specific embeddings further away from general domain embeddings.
摘要：过多的句子嵌入模式给选择一种带来了挑战，特别是对于电信等专业词汇丰富的领域。我们评估了从公开可用的模型和它们的领域自适应变体获得的多个嵌入在点检索精度和它们的(95%)可信区间上的性能。我们建立了一种系统的方法来获得不同嵌入的相似度阈值。我们观察到，微调提高了平均自举精度，并收紧了可信区间。预先训练和微调相结合，使得置信度区间更加紧密。为了理解这些变化，我们分析并报告了top-K、正确句子和随机句子相似度之间的分布重叠与检索准确率和相似度阈值之间的显著相关性。根据目前的文献，我们分析了检索精度的差异是否可以归因于嵌入的各向同性。我们的结论是，嵌入的各向同性(由两个独立的各向同性度量定义衡量)不能归因于更好的检索性能。然而，领域自适应提高了检索精度，也改善了各向同性。我们证明，域自适应使特定于域的嵌入进一步远离一般的域嵌入。

[NLP-83] Attention Score is not All You Need for Token Importance Indicator in KV Cache Reduction: Value Also Matters
[NLP-83] 注意力分数并不是KV缓存减少中代币重要性指标所需的全部：价值也很重要

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12335
作者: Zhiyu Guo,Hidetaka Kamigaito,Taro Watanabe
关键词: large language models, Scaling the context, book summarization, language models, context size
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、扩展上下文、书籍摘要、语言模型、上下文大小
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Scaling the context size of large language models (LLMs) enables them to perform various new tasks, e.g., book summarization. However, the memory cost of the Key and Value (KV) cache in attention significantly limits the practical applications of LLMs. Recent works have explored token pruning for KV cache reduction in LLMs, relying solely on attention scores as a token importance indicator. However, our investigation into value vector norms revealed a notably non-uniform pattern questioning their reliance only on attention scores. Inspired by this, we propose a new method: Value-Aware Token Pruning (VATP) which uses both attention scores and the \ell_1 norm of value vectors to evaluate token importance. Extensive experiments on LLaMA2-7B-chat and Vicuna-v1.5-7B across 16 LongBench tasks demonstrate VATP’s superior performance.
摘要：扩展大型语言模型（LLM）的上下文大小使它们能够执行各种新任务，例如，书籍摘要。然而，备受关注的Key and Value（KV）缓存的内存成本严重限制了LLM的实际应用。最近的作品探索了代币修剪以减少LLM中的KV缓存，仅依赖注意力分数作为代币重要性指标。然而，我们对价值载体规范的调查揭示了一种明显不一致的模式，质疑它们仅对注意力分数的依赖。受此启发，我们提出了一种新方法：价值感知令牌修剪（VATP），它使用注意力分数和 \ell_1 评估代币重要性的价值载体规范。在LLaMA 2 - 7 B-chat和Vicuna-v1.5- 7 B上进行了16个LongBench任务的广泛实验，证明了VATP的卓越性能。

[NLP-84] Retrieval Meets Reasoning: Dynamic In-Context Editing for Long-Text Understanding
[NLP-84] 检索遇到推理：动态上下文编辑以实现长文本理解

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12331
作者: Weizhi Fei,Xueyan Niu,Guoqing Xie,Yanhua Zhang,Bo Bai,Lei Deng,Wei Han
关键词: Current Large Language, Large Language Models, Current Large, Large Language, face inherent limitations
中文关键词: 当前的大型语言、大型语言模型、当前的大型、大型语言面临固有的限制
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Current Large Language Models (LLMs) face inherent limitations due to their pre-defined context lengths, which impede their capacity for multi-hop reasoning within extensive textual contexts. While existing techniques like Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) have attempted to bridge this gap by sourcing external information, they fall short when direct answers are not readily available. We introduce a novel approach that re-imagines information retrieval through dynamic in-context editing, inspired by recent breakthroughs in knowledge editing. By treating lengthy contexts as malleable external knowledge, our method interactively gathers and integrates relevant information, thereby enabling LLMs to perform sophisticated reasoning steps. Experimental results demonstrate that our method effectively empowers context-limited LLMs, such as Llama2, to engage in multi-hop reasoning with improved performance, which outperforms state-of-the-art context window extrapolation methods and even compares favorably to more advanced commercial long-context models. Our interactive method not only enhances reasoning capabilities but also mitigates the associated training and computational costs, making it a pragmatic solution for enhancing LLMs’ reasoning within expansive contexts.
摘要：当前的大型语言模型由于其预先定义的上下文长度而面临着固有的局限性，这阻碍了它们在广泛的文本上下文中进行多跳推理的能力。虽然现有的技术，如检索-增强生成(RAG)，试图通过寻找外部信息来弥合这一差距，但当无法获得直接答案时，它们就达不到要求。我们介绍了一种新的方法，它通过动态的上下文编辑来重新想象信息检索，灵感来自于最近在知识编辑方面的突破。通过将冗长的上下文视为可延展的外部知识，我们的方法交互地收集和集成相关信息，从而使LLMS能够执行复杂的推理步骤。实验结果表明，该方法能够有效地支持上下文受限的LLMS(如Llama2)进行多跳推理，其性能优于最新的上下文窗口外推方法，甚至优于更先进的商业长上下文模型。我们的交互式方法不仅增强了推理能力，而且降低了相关的训练和计算成本，使其成为在可扩展的上下文中增强LLMS推理的实用解决方案。

[NLP-85] SNAP: Unlearning Selective Knowledge in Large Language Models with Negative Instructions
[NLP-85] SNAP：在具有负面指令的大型语言模型中放弃选择性知识

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12329
作者: Minseok Choi,Daniel Rim,Dohyun Lee,Jaegul Choo
关键词: Instruction-following large language, large language models, Instruction-following large, language models, general audience
中文关键词: 遵循指令的大型语言、大型语言模型、遵循指令的大型语言模型、普通受众
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 16 pages, 5 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Instruction-following large language models (LLMs), such as ChatGPT, have become increasingly popular with the general audience, many of whom are incorporating them into their daily routines. However, these LLMs inadvertently disclose personal or copyrighted information, which calls for a machine unlearning method to remove selective knowledge. Previous attempts sought to forget the link between the target information and its associated entities, but it rather led to generating undesirable responses about the target, compromising the end-user experience. In this work, we propose SNAP, an innovative framework designed to selectively unlearn information by 1) training an LLM with negative instructions to generate obliterated responses, 2) augmenting hard positives to retain the original LLM performance, and 3) applying the novel Wasserstein regularization to ensure adequate deviation from the initial weights of the LLM. We evaluate our framework on various NLP benchmarks and demonstrate that our approach retains the original LLM capabilities, while successfully unlearning the specified information.
摘要：ChatGPT等遵循教学的大型语言模型越来越受到大众的欢迎，许多人正在将它们融入他们的日常生活中。然而，这些LLM无意中泄露了个人或受版权保护的信息，这需要一种机器遗忘方法来移除选择性知识。以前的尝试试图忘记目标信息及其相关实体之间的联系，但这反而导致了对目标的不良反应，损害了最终用户的体验。在这项工作中，我们提出了SNAP，这是一种创新的框架，旨在通过以下方式选择性地遗忘信息：1)使用否定指令训练LLM以生成被抹去的响应；2)增加硬正项以保持LLM的原始性能；3)应用新颖的Wasserstein正则化来确保LLM的初始权值有足够的偏差。我们在不同的NLP基准测试上对我们的框架进行了评估，并证明了我们的方法保留了原始的LLM能力，同时成功地忘记了指定的信息。

[NLP-86] Automatic benchmarking of large multimodal models via iterative experiment programming
[NLP-86] 通过迭代实验编程对大型多峰模型进行自动基准测试

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12321
作者: Alessandro Conti,Enrico Fini,Paolo Rota,Yiming Wang,Massimiliano Mancini,Elisa Ricci
关键词: Assessing the capabilities, large multimodal models, creation of ad-hoc, benchmarks requires tremendous, requires tremendous amounts
中文关键词: 评估能力、大型多模式模型、创建临时基准需要大量，需要大量
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: 31 pages, 6 figures, code is available at this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Assessing the capabilities of large multimodal models (LMMs) often requires the creation of ad-hoc evaluations. Currently, building new benchmarks requires tremendous amounts of manual work for each specific analysis. This makes the evaluation process tedious and costly. In this paper, we present APEx, Automatic Programming of Experiments, the first framework for automatic benchmarking of LMMs. Given a research question expressed in natural language, APEx leverages a large language model (LLM) and a library of pre-specified tools to generate a set of experiments for the model at hand, and progressively compile a scientific report. The report drives the testing procedure: based on the current status of the investigation, APEx chooses which experiments to perform and whether the results are sufficient to draw conclusions. Finally, the LLM refines the report, presenting the results to the user in natural language. Thanks to its modularity, our framework is flexible and extensible as new tools become available. Empirically, APEx reproduces the findings of existing studies while allowing for arbitrary analyses and hypothesis testing.
摘要：评估大型多通道模型(LMM)的能力通常需要创建特别评估。目前，构建新的基准需要为每个特定的分析做大量的人工工作。这使得评估过程单调乏味，成本高昂。在本文中，我们提出了第一个用于LMM自动基准测试的框架–APEX，即自动实验程序设计。给定一个用自然语言表达的研究问题，APEX利用一个大型语言模型(LLM)和一个预先指定的工具库为手头的模型生成一组实验，并逐步编写一份科学报告。该报告推动了测试程序：根据调查的当前状态，APEX选择要进行哪些实验，以及结果是否足以得出结论。最后，LLM改进报告，以自然语言将结果呈现给用户。由于它的模块化，随着新工具的出现，我们的框架是灵活和可扩展的。在经验上，APEX复制了现有研究的结果，同时允许任意分析和假设检验。

[NLP-87] PRePair: Pointwise Reasoning Enhance Pairwise Evaluating for Robust Instruction-Following Assessments
[NLP-87] PRRePair：逐点推理增强成对评估，以实现稳健的教学遵循评估

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12319
作者: Hawon Jeong,ChaeHun Park,Jimin Hong,Jaegul Choo
关键词: large language models, natural language generation, evaluating natural language, language models, language generation
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、自然语言生成、评估自然语言、语言模型、语言生成
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Pairwise evaluation using large language models (LLMs) is widely used for evaluating natural language generation (NLG) tasks. However, the reliability of LLMs is often compromised by biases, such as favoring verbosity and authoritative tone. In the study, we focus on the comparison of two LLM-based evaluation approaches, pointwise and pairwise. Our findings demonstrate that pointwise evaluators exhibit more robustness against undesirable preferences. Further analysis reveals that pairwise evaluators can accurately identify the shortcomings of low-quality outputs even when their judgment is incorrect. These results indicate that LLMs are more severely influenced by their bias in a pairwise evaluation setup. To mitigate this, we propose a hybrid method that integrates pointwise reasoning into pairwise evaluation. Experimental results show that our method enhances the robustness of pairwise evaluators against adversarial samples while preserving accuracy on normal samples.
摘要：使用大型语言模型（LLM）的成对评估被广泛用于评估自然语言生成（NLG）任务。然而，LLM的可靠性常常受到偏见的影响，例如偏爱冗长和权威语气。在这项研究中，我们重点比较了两种基于LLM的评估方法（逐点和成对）。我们的研究结果表明，逐点评估者对不良偏好表现出更强的鲁棒性。进一步的分析表明，即使两两评估者的判断不正确，也可以准确地识别低质量输出的缺点。这些结果表明，LLM在成对评估设置中受到其偏差的影响更严重。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种混合方法，将逐点推理集成到成对评估中。实验结果表明，我们的方法增强了成对评估器对对抗样本的鲁棒性，同时保留了正常样本的准确性。

[NLP-88] Finding Task-specific Subnetworks in Multi-task Spoken Language Understanding Model
[NLP-88] 在多任务口语理解模型中寻找特定任务的子网络

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12317
作者: Hayato Futami,Siddhant Arora,Yosuke Kashiwagi,Emiru Tsunoo,Shinji Watanabe
关键词: spoken language understanding, multi-task spoken language, language understanding, designed to address, Recently
中文关键词: 口语理解，多任务口语，语言理解，旨在解决，最近
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Audio and Speech Processing (eess.AS)
备注: Accepted to Interspeech2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recently, multi-task spoken language understanding (SLU) models have emerged, designed to address various speech processing tasks. However, these models often rely on a large number of parameters. Also, they often encounter difficulties in adapting to new data for a specific task without experiencing catastrophic forgetting of previously trained tasks. In this study, we propose finding task-specific subnetworks within a multi-task SLU model via neural network pruning. In addition to model compression, we expect that the forgetting of previously trained tasks can be mitigated by updating only a task-specific subnetwork. We conduct experiments on top of the state-of-the-art multi-task SLU model ``UniverSLU’', trained for several tasks such as emotion recognition (ER), intent classification (IC), and automatic speech recognition (ASR). We show that pruned models were successful in adapting to additional ASR or IC data with minimal performance degradation on previously trained tasks.
摘要：近年来，多任务口语理解(SLU)模型应运而生，旨在解决各种语音处理任务。然而，这些模型往往依赖于大量的参数。此外，他们经常在适应特定任务的新数据时遇到困难，而不会经历对以前训练的任务的灾难性忘记。在这项研究中，我们建议通过神经网络修剪在多任务SLU模型中寻找特定于任务的子网络。除了模型压缩，我们预计通过只更新特定于任务的子网络可以减轻对先前训练任务的遗忘。我们在目前最先进的多任务SLU模型“Universal SLU”上进行了实验，该模型为情感识别(ER)、意图分类(IC)和自动语音识别(ASR)等任务进行了训练。我们表明，修剪后的模型成功地适应了额外的ASR或IC数据，而之前训练的任务的性能降级最小。

[NLP-89] Can Tool-augmented Large Language Models be Aware of Incomplete Conditions?
[NLP-89] 工具增强的大型语言模型可以意识到不完整条件吗？

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12307
作者: Seungbin Yang,ChaeHun Park,Taehee Kim,Jaegul Choo
关键词: large language models, integrating large language, Recent advancements, real-world environments, language models
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、集成大型语言、最新进展、现实世界环境、语言模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recent advancements in integrating large language models (LLMs) with tools have allowed the models to interact with real-world environments. However, these tool-augmented LLMs often encounter incomplete scenarios when users provide partial information or the necessary tools are unavailable. Recognizing and managing such scenarios is crucial for LLMs to ensure their reliability, but this exploration remains understudied. This study examines whether LLMs can identify incomplete conditions and appropriately determine when to refrain from using tools. To this end, we address a dataset by manipulating instances from two datasets by removing necessary tools or essential information for tool invocation. We confirm that most LLMs are challenged to identify the additional information required to utilize specific tools and the absence of appropriate tools. Our research can contribute to advancing reliable LLMs by addressing scenarios that commonly arise during interactions between humans and LLMs.
摘要：在将大型语言模型(LLM)与工具集成方面的最新进展使模型能够与真实世界环境进行交互。然而，当用户提供部分信息或必要的工具不可用时，这些工具增强的LLM经常遇到不完整的场景。识别和管理这种情况对于低成本管理系统确保其可靠性至关重要，但这一探索仍未得到充分研究。这项研究考察了LLMS是否能够识别不完全条件，并适当地确定何时不使用工具。为此，我们通过从两个数据集中操作实例来处理数据集，方法是删除必要的工具或工具调用的基本信息。我们确认，大多数土地管理办法面临着查明利用特定工具所需的额外信息以及缺乏适当工具的挑战。我们的研究可以通过解决在人类和LLM之间的互动中经常出现的场景来促进可靠的LLM。

[NLP-90] COT: A Generative Approach for Hate Speech Counter-Narratives via Contrastive Optimal Transport
[NLP-90] COT：通过对比最优传输来生成仇恨言论反叙事的生成方法

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12304
作者: Linhao Zhang,Li Jin,Guangluan Xu,Xiaoyu Li,Xian Sun
关键词: non-aggressive fact-based arguments, direct responses consisting, highly effective approach, fact-based arguments, hate speech
中文关键词: 非攻击性的基于事实的论点、直接反应、高效的方法、基于事实的论点、仇恨言论
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: IEEE jounrnals

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Counter-narratives, which are direct responses consisting of non-aggressive fact-based arguments, have emerged as a highly effective approach to combat the proliferation of hate speech. Previous methodologies have primarily focused on fine-tuning and post-editing techniques to ensure the fluency of generated contents, while overlooking the critical aspects of individualization and relevance concerning the specific hatred targets, such as LGBT groups, immigrants, etc. This research paper introduces a novel framework based on contrastive optimal transport, which effectively addresses the challenges of maintaining target interaction and promoting diversification in generating counter-narratives. Firstly, an Optimal Transport Kernel (OTK) module is leveraged to incorporate hatred target information in the token representations, in which the comparison pairs are extracted between original and transported features. Secondly, a self-contrastive learning module is employed to address the issue of model degeneration. This module achieves this by generating an anisotropic distribution of token representations. Finally, a target-oriented search method is integrated as an improved decoding strategy to explicitly promote domain relevance and diversification in the inference process. This strategy modifies the model’s confidence score by considering both token similarity and target relevance. Quantitative and qualitative experiments have been evaluated on two benchmark datasets, which demonstrate that our proposed model significantly outperforms current methods evaluated by metrics from multiple aspects.
摘要：反叙事是由非侵略性的基于事实的论点组成的直接反应，已经成为打击仇恨言论扩散的一种非常有效的方法。以往的研究方法主要侧重于微调和后期编辑技术，以确保生成内容的流畅性，而忽略了与特定仇恨目标(如LGBT群体、移民等)相关的个人化和相关性的关键方面。本文介绍了一个基于对比最优传输的新框架，该框架有效地解决了在生成反叙事时保持目标互动和促进多样化的挑战。首先，利用最优传输核(OTK)模块将仇恨目标信息合并到令牌表示中，在该表示中提取原始特征和传输特征之间的比较对。其次，采用自对比学习模型解决模型退化问题。该模块通过生成令牌表示的各向异性分布来实现这一点。最后，结合面向目标的搜索方法作为改进的解码策略，在推理过程中明确地促进领域相关性和多样性。该策略通过同时考虑令牌相似度和目标相关度来修改模型的置信度。在两个基准数据集上进行了定量和定性实验，从多个方面证明了该模型的性能明显优于现有的基于度量的方法。

[NLP-91] Fast and Slow Generating: An Empirical Study on Large and Small Language Models Collaborative Decoding
[NLP-91] 快速和缓慢生成：大大小小语言模型协同解码的实证研究

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12295
作者: Kaiyan Zhang,Jianyu Wang,Ning Ding,Biqing Qi,Ermo Hua,Xingtai Lv,Bowen Zhou
关键词: expensive training cost, demonstrate impressive performance, face significant drawbacks, high inference latency, Large Language Models
中文关键词: 昂贵的训练成本、表现出令人印象深刻的性能、面临重大缺陷、高推理延迟、大型语言模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate impressive performance in diverse applications, yet they face significant drawbacks, including high inference latency, expensive training cost, and generation of hallucination. Collaborative decoding between large and small language models (SLMs) offers a novel approach to address these challenges. Inspired by dual-process cognitive theory, we integrate these methods into a unified framework termed Fast and Slow Generating (FS-GEN). This paper explores several techniques within the FS-GEN framework, including speculative decoding, contrastive decoding, and emulator or proxy fine-tuning. We provide a comprehensive analysis of these methodologies, offering insights into their similarities and differences under this framework. Our study delves into the differential knowledge capabilities of LLMs versus SLMs through the FS-GEN lens, revealing that fewer than 20% of collaborative interactions are required across various methods. These interactions adhere to a scaling law relative to the parameter ratios, thereby facilitating predictable collaboration. Furthermore, we investigate the specific positions where collaboration is most effective from an uncertainty perspective, yielding novel insights that could refine FS-GEN methods. Our findings reveal that the essential difference between models of different sizes lies in the uncertainty of the next token prediction, where interventions by larger models are most needed to assist the smaller ones. Code for Reproduction: this https URL
摘要：大型语言模型在不同的应用中表现出令人印象深刻的性能，但它们也面临着显著的缺陷，包括高推理延迟、昂贵的训练成本和产生幻觉。大小语言模型(SLM)之间的协作解码为解决这些挑战提供了一种新的方法。在双过程认知理论的启发下，我们将这些方法集成到一个统一的框架中，称为快慢生成(FS-Gen)。本文探讨了FS-Gen框架中的几种技术，包括推测解码、对比解码和仿真器或代理微调。我们对这些方法进行了全面的分析，并在此框架下深入分析了它们的异同。我们的研究通过FS-Gen镜头深入研究了LLM和SLM的差异知识能力，揭示了不同方法所需的协作交互不到20%。这些相互作用遵循相对于参数比率的比例定律，从而促进了可预测的协作。此外，我们从不确定性的角度调查了协作最有效的特定职位，产生了可以改进FS-Gen方法的新见解。我们的发现表明，不同规模的模型之间的本质区别在于下一个象征性预测的不确定性，其中最需要较大模型的干预来帮助较小的模型。用于复制的代码：此HTTPS URL

[NLP-92] What Matters in Learning Facts in Language Models? Multifaceted Knowledge Probing with Diverse Multi-Prompt Datasets
[NLP-92] 学习语言模型中的事实有什么重要？利用多样化的多提示数据集进行多面知识探索

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12277
作者: Xin Zhao,Naoki Yoshinaga,Daisuke Oba
关键词: Large language models, Large language, language models, face issues, making it vital
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，大型语言，语言模型，面对问题，使其至关重要
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language models (LLMs) face issues in handling factual knowledge, making it vital to evaluate their true ability to understand facts. In this study, we introduce knowledge probing frameworks, BELIEF(-ICL), to evaluate the knowledge understanding ability of not only encoder-based PLMs but also decoder-based PLMs from diverse perspectives. BELIEFs utilize a multi-prompt dataset to evaluate PLM’s accuracy, consistency, and reliability in factual knowledge understanding. To provide a more reliable evaluation with BELIEFs, we semi-automatically create MyriadLAMA, which has more diverse prompts than existing datasets. We validate the effectiveness of BELIEFs in correctly and comprehensively evaluating PLM’s factual understanding ability through extensive evaluations. We further investigate key factors in learning facts in LLMs, and reveal the limitation of the prompt-based knowledge probing. The dataset is anonymously publicized.
摘要：大型语言模型（LLM）在处理事实知识方面面临问题，因此评估其理解事实的真实能力至关重要。在这项研究中，我们引入了知识探测框架BELIEF（-ICL），从不同的角度评估基于编码器的PLM以及基于解码器的PLM的知识理解能力。BLEIEF利用多提示数据集来评估PLM在事实知识理解方面的准确性、一致性和可靠性。为了通过BLEEFs提供更可靠的评估，我们半自动创建MyriadLAMA，它比现有数据集具有更多样化的提示。我们通过广泛的评估验证了BLEEFs在正确、全面评估PLM事实理解能力方面的有效性。我们进一步研究了LLM学习事实的关键因素，并揭示了基于预算的知识探索的局限性。该数据集是匿名公开的。

[NLP-93] CodeNav: Beyond tool-use to using real-world codebases with LLM agents
[NLP-93] CodeNav：超越工具使用到与LLM代理一起使用现实世界的代码库

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12276
作者: Tanmay Gupta,Luca Weihs,Aniruddha Kembhavi
关键词: leverages previously unseen, tool-use LLM agents, previously unseen code, unseen code repositories, solve user queries
中文关键词: 利用以前看不见的、使用工具的LLM代理、以前看不见的代码、看不见的代码存储库，解决用户查询
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Software Engineering (cs.SE)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We present CodeNav, an LLM agent that navigates and leverages previously unseen code repositories to solve user queries. In contrast to tool-use LLM agents that require ``registration’’ of all relevant tools via manual descriptions within the LLM context, CodeNav automatically indexes and searches over code blocks in the target codebase, finds relevant code snippets, imports them, and uses them to iteratively generate a solution with execution feedback. To highlight the core-capabilities of CodeNav, we first showcase three case studies where we use CodeNav for solving complex user queries using three diverse codebases. Next, on three benchmarks, we quantitatively compare the effectiveness of code-use (which only has access to the target codebase) to tool-use (which has privileged access to all tool names and descriptions). Finally, we study the effect of varying kinds of tool and library descriptions on code-use performance, as well as investigate the advantage of the agent seeing source code as opposed to natural descriptions of code. All code will be made open source under a permissive license.
摘要：我们提出了CodeNav，这是一个LLM代理，它导航并利用以前未见过的代码库来解决用户查询。工具使用的LLM代理需要通过LLM上下文中的手动描述对所有相关工具进行“注册”，而CodeNav则自动对目标代码库中的代码块进行索引和搜索，找到相关的代码片段，导入它们，并使用它们迭代地生成具有执行反馈的解决方案。为了突出CodeNav的核心功能，我们首先展示了三个案例研究，在这些案例中，我们使用CodeNav使用三个不同的代码库来解决复杂的用户查询。接下来，在三个基准测试中，我们定量地比较了代码使用(只能访问目标代码库)和工具使用(具有访问所有工具名称和描述的特权)的有效性。最后，我们研究了不同类型的工具和库描述对代码使用性能的影响，以及调查了代理查看源代码相对于代码的自然描述的优势。所有代码都将在许可许可下开放源代码。

[NLP-94] SafeInfer: Context Adaptive Decoding Time Safety Alignment for Large Language Models
[NLP-94] SafeInfer：大型语言模型的上下文自适应解码时间安全对齐

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12274
作者: Somnath Banerjee,Soham Tripathy,Sayan Layek,Shanu Kumar,Animesh Mukherjee,Rima Hazra
关键词: Safety-aligned language models, imbalanced safety mechanisms, Safety-aligned language, exhibit fragile, fragile and imbalanced
中文关键词: 安全一致的语言模型，不平衡的安全机制，安全一致的语言，表现出脆弱、脆弱和不平衡
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Under review

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Safety-aligned language models often exhibit fragile and imbalanced safety mechanisms, increasing the likelihood of generating unsafe content. In addition, incorporating new knowledge through editing techniques to language models can further compromise safety. To address these issues, we propose SafeInfer, a context-adaptive, decoding-time safety alignment strategy for generating safe responses to user queries. SafeInfer comprises two phases: the safety amplification phase, which employs safe demonstration examples to adjust the model’s hidden states and increase the likelihood of safer outputs, and the safety-guided decoding phase, which influences token selection based on safety-optimized distributions, ensuring the generated content complies with ethical guidelines. Further, we present HarmEval, a novel benchmark for extensive safety evaluations, designed to address potential misuse scenarios in accordance with the policies of leading AI tech giants.
摘要：安全性一致的语言模型通常表现出脆弱和不平衡的安全机制，增加了生成不安全内容的可能性。此外，通过编辑技术将新知识融入语言模型可能会进一步损害安全性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了SafeInfer，这是一种上下文自适应、解码时安全对齐策略，用于生成对用户查询的安全响应。SafeInfer包括两个阶段：安全放大阶段，采用安全演示示例来调整模型的隐藏状态并增加更安全输出的可能性，以及安全引导解码阶段，根据安全优化的分布影响代币选择，确保生成的内容符合道德准则。此外，我们还介绍了HarmEval，这是一个用于广泛安全评估的新型基准，旨在根据领先人工智能技术巨头的政策解决潜在的滥用情况。

[NLP-95] Unveiling Implicit Table Knowledge with Question-Then-Pinpoint Reasoner for Insightful Table Summarization
[NLP-95] 使用“然后精确推理”揭示隐式表知识，以实现有洞察力的表总结

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12269
作者: Kwangwook Seo,Jinyoung Yeo,Dongha Lee
关键词: Implicit knowledge hidden, explicit table cells, Implicit knowledge, data insights, key to generating
中文关键词: 隐藏的隐性知识、显式表单元格、隐性知识、数据洞察、生成的关键
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: work in progress

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Implicit knowledge hidden within the explicit table cells, such as data insights, is the key to generating a high-quality table summary. However, unveiling such implicit knowledge is a non-trivial task. Due to the complex nature of structured tables, it is challenging even for large language models (LLMs) to mine the implicit knowledge in an insightful and faithful manner. To address this challenge, we propose a novel table reasoning framework Question-then-Pinpoint. Our work focuses on building a plug-and-play table reasoner that can self-question the insightful knowledge and answer it by faithfully pinpointing evidence on the table to provide explainable guidance for the summarizer. To train a reliable reasoner, we collect table knowledge by guiding a teacher LLM to follow the coarse-to-fine reasoning paths and refine it through two quality enhancement strategies to selectively distill the high-quality knowledge to the reasoner. Extensive experiments on two table summarization datasets, including our newly proposed InsTaSumm, validate the general effectiveness of our framework.
摘要：隐藏在显式表格单元格中的隐含知识，如数据洞察，是生成高质量表格摘要的关键。然而，揭示这种隐含的知识并不是一项微不足道的任务。由于结构化表格的复杂性，即使对于大型语言模型(LLM)来说，以有洞察力和忠诚度的方式挖掘隐含知识也是具有挑战性的。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的表格推理框架Query-Then-Pinpoint。我们的工作重点是建立一个即插即用的表格推理机，它可以自我质疑有洞察力的知识，并通过忠实地将证据准确地定位在表格上来回答它，为摘要者提供可解释的指导。为了训练可靠的推理机，我们通过引导教师LLM遵循从粗到精的推理路径来收集表知识，并通过两种质量增强策略对其进行提炼，有选择地将高质量的知识提取到推理机。在两个表格摘要数据集上的大量实验，包括我们新提出的InsTaSumm，验证了我们框架的总体有效性。

[NLP-96] owards a Client-Centered Assessment of LLM Therapists by Client Simulation
[NLP-96] 通过客户模拟对LLM治疗师进行以客户为中心的评估

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12266
作者: Jiashuo Wang,Yang Xiao,Yanran Li,Changhe Song,Chunpu Xu,Chenhao Tan,Wenjie Li
关键词: exploring LLMs’ capabilities, LLM therapists, LLM, exploring LLMs’, capabilities and inefficacy
中文关键词: 探索LLM的能力、LLM治疗师、LLM、探索LLM的能力和无效性
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Although there is a growing belief that LLMs can be used as therapists, exploring LLMs’ capabilities and inefficacy, particularly from the client’s perspective, is limited. This work focuses on a client-centered assessment of LLM therapists with the involvement of simulated clients, a standard approach in clinical medical education. However, there are two challenges when applying the approach to assess LLM therapists at scale. Ethically, asking humans to frequently mimic clients and exposing them to potentially harmful LLM outputs can be risky and unsafe. Technically, it can be difficult to consistently compare the performances of different LLM therapists interacting with the same client. To this end, we adopt LLMs to simulate clients and propose ClientCAST, a client-centered approach to assessing LLM therapists by client simulation. Specifically, the simulated client is utilized to interact with LLM therapists and complete questionnaires related to the interaction. Based on the questionnaire results, we assess LLM therapists from three client-centered aspects: session outcome, therapeutic alliance, and self-reported feelings. We conduct experiments to examine the reliability of ClientCAST and use it to evaluate LLMs therapists implemented by Claude-3, GPT-3.5, LLaMA3-70B, and Mixtral 87B. Codes are released at this https URL.
摘要：虽然越来越多的人相信LLM可以被用作治疗师，但对LLM的能力和无效的探索是有限的，特别是从患者的角度。这项工作集中在以客户为中心的LLM治疗师的评估与模拟客户的参与，这是临床医学教育的标准方法。然而，在应用该方法对LLM治疗师进行大规模评估时，存在两个挑战。从伦理上讲，要求人类频繁模仿客户并将他们暴露在潜在有害的LLM输出中可能是危险和不安全的。从技术上讲，很难持续地比较与同一客户互动的不同LLM治疗师的表现。为此，我们采用LLMS来模拟客户，提出了一种以客户为中心的客户模拟评估LLM治疗师的方法–ClientCAST。具体地说，模拟客户被用来与LLM治疗师互动，并完成与互动相关的问卷。基于问卷调查结果，我们从三个方面对LLM治疗师进行了评估：会议结果、治疗联盟和自我报告的感觉。我们进行了实验来检验ClientCAST的可靠性，并使用它来评估由Claude-3、GPT-3.5、LLaMA3-70B和Mixtral 87B实现的LLMS治疗师。代码在此HTTPS URL发布。

[NLP-97] Defending Against Social Engineering Attacks in the Age of LLMs
[NLP-97] 在法学硕士时代防御社会工程攻击

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12263
作者: Lin Ai,Tharindu Kumarage,Amrita Bhattacharjee,Zizhou Liu,Zheng Hui,Michael Davinroy,James Cook,Laura Cassani,Kirill Trapeznikov,Matthias Kirchner,Arslan Basharat,Anthony Hoogs,Joshua Garland,Huan Liu,Julia Hirschberg
关键词: Large Language Models, Large Language, mitigating digital deception, chat-based social engineering, Language Models
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、大型语言、减轻数字欺骗、基于聊天的社会工程、语言模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The proliferation of Large Language Models (LLMs) poses challenges in detecting and mitigating digital deception, as these models can emulate human conversational patterns and facilitate chat-based social engineering (CSE) attacks. This study investigates the dual capabilities of LLMs as both facilitators and defenders against CSE threats. We develop a novel dataset, SEConvo, simulating CSE scenarios in academic and recruitment contexts, and designed to examine how LLMs can be exploited in these situations. Our findings reveal that, while off-the-shelf LLMs generate high-quality CSE content, their detection capabilities are suboptimal, leading to increased operational costs for defense. In response, we propose ConvoSentinel, a modular defense pipeline that improves detection at both the message and the conversation levels, offering enhanced adaptability and cost-effectiveness. The retrieval-augmented module in ConvoSentinel identifies malicious intent by comparing messages to a database of similar conversations, enhancing CSE detection at all stages. Our study highlights the need for advanced strategies to leverage LLMs in cybersecurity.
摘要：大型语言模型的激增给检测和减少数字欺骗带来了挑战，因为这些模型可以模拟人类的对话模式，并促进基于聊天的社会工程(CSE)攻击。本研究探讨低层管理人员作为CSE威胁的促进者和防御者的双重能力。我们开发了一个新的数据集SEConvo，模拟了学术和招聘环境中的CSE场景，并旨在研究如何在这些情况下利用LLM。我们的发现表明，虽然现成的LLM可以生成高质量的CSE内容，但它们的检测能力并不理想，从而导致防御操作成本增加。作为回应，我们提出了ConvoSentinel，这是一种模块化的防御管道，可以同时改进消息和会话级别的检测，提供更强的适应性和成本效益。ConvoSentinel中的检索增强模块通过将消息与类似对话的数据库进行比较来识别恶意意图，从而增强了所有阶段的CSE检测。我们的研究强调了在网络安全中利用低成本管理的高级战略的必要性。

[NLP-98] A Hopfieldian View-based Interpretation for Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
[NLP-98] 基于霍普菲尔德观点的思维链推理解释

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12255
作者: Lijie Hu,Liang Liu,Shu Yang,Xin Chen,Hongru Xiao,Mengdi Li,Pan Zhou,Muhammad Asif Ali,Di Wang
关键词: large language models, holds a significant, significant place, place in augmenting, performance for large
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，在增强大型性能方面占有重要、重要的地位
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Human-Computer Interaction (cs.HC); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: 21 pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Chain-of-Thought (CoT) holds a significant place in augmenting the reasoning performance for large language models (LLMs). While some studies focus on improving CoT accuracy through methods like retrieval enhancement, yet a rigorous explanation for why CoT achieves such success remains unclear. In this paper, we analyze CoT methods under two different settings by asking the following questions: (1) For zero-shot CoT, why does prompting the model with “let’s think step by step” significantly impact its outputs? (2) For few-shot CoT, why does providing examples before questioning the model could substantially improve its reasoning ability? To answer these questions, we conduct a top-down explainable analysis from the Hopfieldian view and propose a Read-and-Control approach for controlling the accuracy of CoT. Through extensive experiments on seven datasets for three different tasks, we demonstrate that our framework can decipher the inner workings of CoT, provide reasoning error localization, and control to come up with the correct reasoning path.
摘要：思想链(CoT)在提高大型语言模型(LLM)的推理性能方面占有重要地位。虽然一些研究的重点是通过检索增强等方法来提高COT的准确性，但对于COT为何取得如此成功的严格解释仍不清楚。本文分析了两种不同情况下的COT方法，提出了以下几个问题：(1)对于零射程COT，为什么“让我们逐步思考”的提示对模型的输出有显著影响？(2)对于少射程COT，为什么在质疑模型之前提供例子可以显著提高其推理能力？为了回答这些问题，我们从Hopfieldian的角度进行了自上而下的可解释性分析，并提出了一种控制COT精度的读取和控制方法。通过对三个不同任务的七个数据集的大量实验，我们证明了我们的框架能够破译COT的内部工作原理，提供推理错误定位，并控制得出正确的推理路径。

[NLP-99] Language and Multimodal Models in Sports: A Survey of Datasets and Applications
[NLP-99] 体育运动中的语言和多模式模型：数据集和应用调查

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12252
作者: Haotian Xia,Zhengbang Yang,Yun Zhao,Yuqing Wang,Jingxi Li,Rhys Tracy,Zhuangdi Zhu,Yuan-fang Wang,Hanjie Chen,Weining Shen
关键词: Natural Language Processing, Natural Language, Recent integration, integration of Natural, Language Processing
中文关键词: 自然语言处理，自然语言，最近的集成，自然的集成，语言处理
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recent integration of Natural Language Processing (NLP) and multimodal models has advanced the field of sports analytics. This survey presents a comprehensive review of the datasets and applications driving these innovations post-2020. We overviewed and categorized datasets into three primary types: language-based, multimodal, and convertible datasets. Language-based and multimodal datasets are for tasks involving text or multimodality (e.g., text, video, audio), respectively. Convertible datasets, initially single-modal (video), can be enriched with additional annotations, such as explanations of actions and video descriptions, to become multimodal, offering future potential for richer and more diverse applications. Our study highlights the contributions of these datasets to various applications, from improving fan experiences to supporting tactical analysis and medical diagnostics. We also discuss the challenges and future directions in dataset development, emphasizing the need for diverse, high-quality data to support real-time processing and personalized user experiences. This survey provides a foundational resource for researchers and practitioners aiming to leverage NLP and multimodal models in sports, offering insights into current trends and future opportunities in the field.
摘要：最近自然语言处理(NLP)和多通道模型的结合推动了体育分析领域的发展。这项调查全面回顾了2020年后推动这些创新的数据集和应用程序。我们概述了数据集，并将其分为三种主要类型：基于语言的数据集、多模式数据集和可转换数据集。基于语言的数据集和多模式数据集分别用于涉及文本或多模式(例如，文本、视频、音频)的任务。可转换的数据集最初是单模式的(视频)，可以用其他注释来丰富，如动作解释和视频描述，以成为多模式数据集，为更丰富、更多样化的应用提供未来的潜力。我们的研究突出了这些数据集对各种应用的贡献，从改善球迷体验到支持战术分析和医疗诊断。我们还讨论了数据集开发中的挑战和未来方向，强调需要多样化的高质量数据来支持实时处理和个性化的用户体验。这项调查为旨在利用体育中的NLP和多模式模型的研究人员和从业者提供了基础资源，提供了对该领域当前趋势和未来机会的见解。

[NLP-100] Mitigate Negative Transfer with Similarity Heuristic Lifelong Prompt Tuning
[NLP-100] 通过相似启发式终身提示调整缓解负转移

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12251
作者: Chenyuan Wu,Gangwei Jiang,Defu Lian
关键词: Lifelong prompt tuning, significantly advanced parameter-efficient, minimal storage demands, advanced parameter-efficient lifelong, Heuristic Lifelong Prompt
中文关键词: 终身即时调整、显着先进的参数效率、最低的存储需求、先进的参数效率终身、启发式终身提示
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: ACL 2024 Findings

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Lifelong prompt tuning has significantly advanced parameter-efficient lifelong learning with its efficiency and minimal storage demands on various tasks. Our empirical studies, however, highlights certain transferability constraints in the current methodologies: a universal algorithm that guarantees consistent positive transfer across all tasks is currently unattainable, especially when dealing dissimilar tasks that may engender negative transfer. Identifying the misalignment between algorithm selection and task specificity as the primary cause of negative transfer, we present the Similarity Heuristic Lifelong Prompt Tuning (SHLPT) framework. This innovative strategy partitions tasks into two distinct subsets by harnessing a learnable similarity metric, thereby facilitating fruitful transfer from tasks regardless of their similarity or dissimilarity. Additionally, SHLPT incorporates a parameter pool to combat catastrophic forgetting effectively. Our experiments shows that SHLPT outperforms state-of-the-art techniques in lifelong learning benchmarks and demonstrates robustness against negative transfer in diverse task sequences.
摘要：终身即时调优以其效率和对各种任务的最小存储需求显著地推进了参数高效的终身学习。然而，我们的实证研究强调了当前方法中的某些可转移性限制：目前还不能实现保证所有任务之间一致正迁移的通用算法，特别是在处理可能产生负迁移的不同任务时。算法选择与任务特异性之间的不匹配是负迁移的主要原因，我们提出了相似性启发式终身提示调整(SHLPT)框架。这一创新策略通过利用可学习的相似性度量将任务划分为两个不同的子集，从而促进了任务的有效转移，而不考虑它们的相似或不同。此外，SHLPT还加入了一个参数池，以有效地对抗灾难性遗忘。我们的实验表明，SHLPT在终身学习基准方面优于最先进的技术，并在不同的任务序列中表现出对负迁移的稳健性。

[NLP-101] roL: Traversal of Layers for Large Language and Vision Models
[NLP-101] roL：大型语言和视觉模型的分层轨迹

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12246
作者: Byung-Kwan Lee,Sangyun Chung,Chae Won Kim,Beomchan Park,Yong Man Ro
关键词: visual instruction tuning, generalization power, advent of visual, Large language, LLVMs
中文关键词: 视觉指令调优、概括能力、视觉的出现、大型语言、LLVMs
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: Code is available in this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language and vision models (LLVMs) have been driven by the generalization power of large language models (LLMs) and the advent of visual instruction tuning. Along with scaling them up directly, these models enable LLVMs to showcase powerful vision language (VL) performances by covering diverse tasks via natural language instructions. However, existing open-source LLVMs that perform comparably to closed-source LLVMs such as GPT-4V are often considered too large (e.g., 26B, 34B, and 110B parameters), having a larger number of layers. These large models demand costly, high-end resources for both training and inference. To address this issue, we present a new efficient LLVM family with 1.8B, 3.8B, and 7B LLM model sizes, Traversal of Layers (TroL), which enables the reuse of layers in a token-wise manner. This layer traversing technique simulates the effect of looking back and retracing the answering stream while increasing the number of forward propagation layers without physically adding more layers. We demonstrate that TroL employs a simple layer traversing approach yet efficiently outperforms the open-source LLVMs with larger model sizes and rivals the performances of the closed-source LLVMs with substantial sizes.
摘要：大语言和视觉模型的泛化能力和可视化教学调整的出现推动了大语言和视觉模型的发展。除了直接放大，这些模型还使LLVM能够通过自然语言指令覆盖各种任务，从而展示强大的视觉语言(VL)性能。然而，与诸如GPT-4V的闭源LLVM性能相当的现有开源LLVM通常被认为太大(例如，26B、34B和110B参数)，具有更多的层数。这些大型模型需要昂贵的高端资源来进行培训和推理。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个新的高效的LLVM系列，具有1.8B、3.8B和7B的LLM模型大小，层的遍历(TROL)，它允许以令牌式的方式重用层。这种层遍历技术模拟了在不物理添加更多层的情况下增加前向传播层数的同时回顾和回溯应答流的效果。我们证明，TROL采用简单的层遍历方法，但其性能优于模型尺寸较大的开源LLVM，并可与较大尺寸的闭源LLVM相媲美。

[NLP-102] PFID: Privacy First Inference Delegation Framework for LLMs
[NLP-102] PFID：LLM的隐私优先推理授权框架

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12238
作者: Haoyan Yang,Zhitao Li,Yong Zhang,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Ming Li,Jing Xiao
关键词: framework named PFID, localizing user data, named PFID, critical privacy concerns, addresses critical privacy
中文关键词: 名为PFID的框架，本地化用户数据，名为PFID，关键隐私问题，解决关键隐私
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Submitted to EMNLP2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper introduces a novel privacy-preservation framework named PFID for LLMs that addresses critical privacy concerns by localizing user data through model sharding and singular value decomposition. When users are interacting with LLM systems, their prompts could be subject to being exposed to eavesdroppers within or outside LLM system providers who are interested in collecting users’ input. In this work, we proposed a framework to camouflage user input, so as to alleviate privacy issues. Our framework proposes to place model shards on the client and the public server, we sent compressed hidden states instead of prompts to and from servers. Clients have held back information that can re-privatized the hidden states so that overall system performance is comparable to traditional LLMs services. Our framework was designed to be communication efficient, computation can be delegated to the local client so that the server’s computation burden can be lightened. We conduct extensive experiments on machine translation tasks to verify our framework’s performance.
摘要：提出了一种新的LLMS隐私保护框架PFID，该框架通过模型分片和奇异值分解来定位用户数据，从而解决了关键隐私问题。当用户与LLm系统交互时，他们的提示可能会暴露给LLm系统提供商内部或外部的窃听者，这些人有兴趣收集用户的输入。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个框架来伪装用户输入，以缓解隐私问题。我们的框架建议将模型碎片放置在客户端和公共服务器上，我们向服务器发送压缩的隐藏状态，而不是向服务器发送提示。客户保留了可以将隐藏状态重新私有化的信息，以便总体系统性能与传统的LLMS服务相当。我们的框架设计为通信高效，计算可以委托给本地客户端，从而减轻了服务器的计算负担。我们在机器翻译任务上进行了大量的实验来验证我们的框架的性能。

[NLP-103] SyncVSR: Data-Efficient Visual Speech Recognition with End-to-End Crossmodal Audio Token Synchronization
[NLP-103] NSO VSR：具有端到端跨模式音频令牌同步的数据高效视觉语音识别

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12233
作者: Young Jin Ahn,Jungwoo Park,Sangha Park,Jonghyun Choi,Kee-Eung Kim
关键词: Visual Speech Recognition, Speech Recognition, interpret spoken content, aiming to interpret, Recognition
中文关键词: 视觉语音识别，语音识别，解释口语内容，旨在解释，识别
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Visual Speech Recognition (VSR) stands at the intersection of computer vision and speech recognition, aiming to interpret spoken content from visual cues. A prominent challenge in VSR is the presence of homophenes-visually similar lip gestures that represent different phonemes. Prior approaches have sought to distinguish fine-grained visemes by aligning visual and auditory semantics, but often fell short of full synchronization. To address this, we present SyncVSR, an end-to-end learning framework that leverages quantized audio for frame-level crossmodal supervision. By integrating a projection layer that synchronizes visual representation with acoustic data, our encoder learns to generate discrete audio tokens from a video sequence in a non-autoregressive manner. SyncVSR shows versatility across tasks, languages, and modalities at the cost of a forward pass. Our empirical evaluations show that it not only achieves state-of-the-art results but also reduces data usage by up to ninefold.
摘要：视觉语音识别(VSR)是计算机视觉和语音识别的交叉点，旨在从视觉线索中理解语音内容。VSR中的一个突出挑战是同音异物的存在–视觉上相似的嘴唇手势代表不同的音素。以前的方法试图通过对齐视觉和听觉语义来区分细粒度的视位，但往往达不到完全同步。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了SyncVSR，这是一个端到端的学习框架，它利用量化的音频进行帧级别的跨模式监管。通过集成将视觉表示与声音数据同步的投影层，我们的编码器学习以非自回归的方式从视频序列生成离散的音频标记。SyncVSR以向前传球为代价，显示了跨任务、语言和模式的多功能性。我们的经验评估表明，它不仅获得了最先进的结果，而且将数据使用量减少了多达九倍。

[NLP-104] “You Gotta be a Doctor Lin”: An Investigation of Name-Based Bias of Large Language Models in Employment Recommendations
[NLP-104] “你一定要成为林博士”：大型语言模型在就业推荐中基于名称的偏见调查

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12232
作者: Huy Nghiem,John Prindle,Jieyu Zhao,Hal Daumé III
关键词: Social science research, Social science, Large Language Models, employment practices, science research
中文关键词: 社会科学研究、社会科学、大型语言模型、就业实践、科学研究
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: preprint, 18 pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Social science research has shown that candidates with names indicative of certain races or genders often face discrimination in employment practices. Similarly, Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated racial and gender biases in various applications. In this study, we utilize GPT-3.5-Turbo and Llama 3-70B-Instruct to simulate hiring decisions and salary recommendations for candidates with 320 first names that strongly signal their race and gender, across over 750,000 prompts. Our empirical results indicate a preference among these models for hiring candidates with White female-sounding names over other demographic groups across 40 occupations. Additionally, even among candidates with identical qualifications, salary recommendations vary by as much as 5% between different subgroups. A comparison with real-world labor data reveals inconsistent alignment with U.S. labor market characteristics, underscoring the necessity of risk investigation of LLM-powered systems.
摘要：社会科学研究表明，姓名代表某些种族或性别的候选人在就业实践中经常面临歧视。同样，大型语言模型（LLM）在各种应用程序中表现出种族和性别偏见。在本研究中，我们利用GPT-3.5-Turbo和Llama 3- 70 B-Direct在超过750，000个提示中为拥有320个强烈表明其种族和性别的名字的候选人模拟招聘决策和薪资建议。我们的实证结果表明，这些模型更喜欢雇用名字听起来像白人女性的候选人，而不是40个职业的其他人口群体。此外，即使在资历相同的候选人中，不同亚组之间的薪资建议差异也高达5%。与现实世界的劳动力数据的比较显示，与美国劳动力市场特征不一致，凸显了对LLM驱动的系统进行风险调查的必要性。

[NLP-105] MCSD: An Efficient Language Model with Diverse Fusion
[NLP-105] MCSD：一种具有多元化融合的高效语言模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12230
作者: Hua Yang,Duohai Li,Shiman Li
关键词: Natural Language Processing, increasing sequence lengths, capturing long-term dependencies, excel in Natural, Language Processing
中文关键词: 自然语言处理，增加序列长度，捕获长期依赖关系，擅长自然语言处理
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: 8 pages, 9 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Transformers excel in Natural Language Processing (NLP) due to their prowess in capturing long-term dependencies but suffer from exponential resource consumption with increasing sequence lengths. To address these challenges, we propose MCSD model, an efficient language model with linear scaling and fast inference speed. MCSD model leverages diverse feature fusion, primarily through the multi-channel slope and decay (MCSD) block, to robustly represent features. This block comprises slope and decay sections that extract features across diverse temporal receptive fields, facilitating capture of both local and global information. In addition, MCSD block conducts element-wise fusion of diverse features to further enhance the delicate feature extraction capability. For inference, we formulate the inference process into a recurrent representation, slashing space complexity to O(1) and time complexity to O(N) respectively. Our experiments show that MCSD attains higher throughput and lower GPU memory consumption compared to Transformers, while maintaining comparable performance to larger-scale language learning models on benchmark tests. These attributes position MCSD as a promising base for edge deployment and embodied intelligence.
摘要：Transformers在自然语言处理(NLP)方面表现出色，因为他们在捕获长期依赖关系方面能力很强，但随着序列长度的增加，他们遭受了指数级的资源消耗。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了MCSD模型，这是一种具有线性伸缩性和快速推理速度的高效语言模型。MCSD模型利用不同的特征融合，主要通过多通道斜率和衰减(MCSD)块来稳健地表示特征。这一块包括斜率和衰减区，提取跨越不同时间感受场的特征，促进局部和全局信息的捕获。此外，MCSD块对不同的特征进行元素级融合，进一步增强了细微特征提取能力。对于推理，我们将推理过程表示为递归表示，将空间复杂度降至O(1)，将时间复杂度降至O(N)。我们的实验表明，与Transformers相比，MCSD获得了更高的吞吐量和更低的GPU内存消耗，同时在基准测试中保持了与更大规模的语言学习模型相当的性能。这些属性将MCSD定位为边缘部署和体现智能的有前途的基础。

[NLP-106] oxiCloakCN: Evaluating Robustness of Offensive Language Detection in Chinese with Cloaking Perturbations
[NLP-106] oxiCloakCN：评估具有伪装扰动的中文攻击性语言检测的鲁棒性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12223
作者: Yunze Xiao,Yujia Hu,Kenny Tsu Wei Choo,Roy Ka-wei Lee
关键词: respectful digital environment, Detecting hate speech, digital environment, hate speech, essential for maintaining
中文关键词: 尊重的数字环境，检测仇恨言论，数字环境，仇恨言论，维护必不可少
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computers and Society (cs.CY)
备注: 10 pages,5 Tables, 2 Figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Detecting hate speech and offensive language is essential for maintaining a safe and respectful digital environment. This study examines the limitations of state-of-the-art large language models (LLMs) in identifying offensive content within systematically perturbed data, with a focus on Chinese, a language particularly susceptible to such perturbations. We introduce \textsfToxiCloakCN, an enhanced dataset derived from ToxiCN, augmented with homophonic substitutions and emoji transformations, to test the robustness of LLMs against these cloaking perturbations. Our findings reveal that existing models significantly underperform in detecting offensive content when these perturbations are applied. We provide an in-depth analysis of how different types of offensive content are affected by these perturbations and explore the alignment between human and model explanations of offensiveness. Our work highlights the urgent need for more advanced techniques in offensive language detection to combat the evolving tactics used to evade detection mechanisms.
摘要：检测仇恨言论和攻击性语言对于维护安全和尊重的数字环境至关重要。这项研究考察了最新的大型语言模型(LLM)在识别系统扰动数据中的攻击性内容方面的局限性，重点是中文，这是一种特别容易受到此类扰动的语言。我们引入了ToxiCN的增强型数据集ToxiCloakCN来测试LLMS对这些伪装扰动的健壮性。我们的发现表明，当应用这些扰动时，现有模型在检测攻击性内容方面表现明显不佳。我们深入分析了不同类型的攻击性内容如何受到这些干扰的影响，并探索了人类和模型对攻击性的解释之间的一致性。我们的工作突出了在攻击性语言检测中迫切需要更先进的技术，以对抗用于逃避检测机制的不断演变的战术。

[NLP-107] On-Policy Fine-grained Knowledge Feedback for Hallucination Mitigation
[NLP-107] 针对缓解幻觉的政策细粒度知识反馈

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12221
作者: Xueru Wen,Xinyu Lu,Xinyan Guan,Yaojie Lu,Hongyu Lin,Ben He,Xianpei Han,Le Sun
关键词: RLFH, Previous learning-based methods, large language models, detecting knowledge boundaries, Hallucination occurs
中文关键词: RL FH，以前的基于学习的方法，大型语言模型，检测知识边界，幻觉发生
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Hallucination occurs when large language models (LLMs) exhibit behavior that deviates from the boundaries of their knowledge during the response generation process. Previous learning-based methods focus on detecting knowledge boundaries and finetuning models with instance-level feedback, but they suffer from inaccurate signals due to off-policy data sampling and coarse-grained feedback. In this paper, we introduce \textit\bReinforcement \bLearning \bfor \bHallucination (RLFH), a fine-grained feedback-based online reinforcement learning method for hallucination mitigation. Unlike previous learning-based methods, RLFH enables LLMs to explore the boundaries of their internal knowledge and provide on-policy, fine-grained feedback on these explorations. To construct fine-grained feedback for learning reliable generation behavior, RLFH decomposes the outcomes of large models into atomic facts, provides statement-level evaluation signals, and traces back the signals to the tokens of the original responses. Finally, RLFH adopts the online reinforcement algorithm with these token-level rewards to adjust model behavior for hallucination mitigation. For effective on-policy optimization, RLFH also introduces an LLM-based fact assessment framework to verify the truthfulness and helpfulness of atomic facts without human intervention. Experiments on HotpotQA, SQuADv2, and Biography benchmarks demonstrate that RLFH can balance their usage of internal knowledge during the generation process to eliminate the hallucination behavior of LLMs.
摘要：当大型语言模型(LLM)在反应生成过程中表现出偏离其知识边界的行为时，就会出现幻觉。以往的基于学习的方法侧重于发现知识边界和使用实例级反馈优化模型，但由于非策略数据采样和粗粒度反馈，它们存在信号不准确的问题。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于细粒度反馈的在线强化学习方法RLFH，用于幻觉缓解。与以前基于学习的方法不同，RLFH使LLM能够探索其内部知识的边界，并就这些探索提供政策上的、细粒度的反馈。为了构造细粒度反馈以学习可靠的生成行为，RLFH将大型模型的结果分解为原子事实，提供语句级评估信号，并将信号追溯到原始响应的标记。最后，RLFH采用带有这些令牌级奖励的在线强化算法来调整模型行为以缓解幻觉。为了有效地进行策略优化，RLFH还引入了基于LLM的事实评估框架来验证原子事实的真实性和有用性，而无需人工干预。在HotpotQA、SQuADv2和Biology基准测试上的实验表明，RLFH能够平衡它们在生成过程中对内部知识的使用，从而消除LLM的幻觉行为。

[NLP-108] Is persona enough for personality? Using ChatGPT to reconstruct an agents latent personality from simple descriptions
[NLP-108] 个性足以体现个性吗？使用ChatGPT从简单描述中重建代理人的潜在个性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12216
作者: Yongyi Ji,Zhisheng Tang,Mayank Kejriwal
关键词: human cognition, fundamental aspect, aspect of human, Personality, influence behaviors
中文关键词: 人类认知，基本方面，人的方面，个性，影响行为
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: Accepted to the ICML 2024 Workshop on Large Language Models and Cognition

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Personality, a fundamental aspect of human cognition, contains a range of traits that influence behaviors, thoughts, and emotions. This paper explores the capabilities of large language models (LLMs) in reconstructing these complex cognitive attributes based only on simple descriptions containing socio-demographic and personality type information. Utilizing the HEXACO personality framework, our study examines the consistency of LLMs in recovering and predicting underlying (latent) personality dimensions from simple descriptions. Our experiments reveal a significant degree of consistency in personality reconstruction, although some inconsistencies and biases, such as a tendency to default to positive traits in the absence of explicit information, are also observed. Additionally, socio-demographic factors like age and number of children were found to influence the reconstructed personality dimensions. These findings have implications for building sophisticated agent-based simulacra using LLMs and highlight the need for further research on robust personality generation in LLMs.
摘要：人格是人类认知的一个基本方面，它包含一系列影响行为、思想和情感的特征。本文仅基于包含社会人口统计和人格类型信息的简单描述，探讨了大语言模型(LLM)重构这些复杂认知属性的能力。本研究利用赫士古人格框架，检验了LLMS在从简单描述中恢复和预测潜在(潜在)人格维度的一致性。我们的实验显示了人格重建的显著程度的一致性，尽管也观察到了一些不一致和偏见，例如在缺乏明确信息的情况下倾向于默认积极的特征。此外，年龄和子女数量等社会人口因素被发现影响重建的人格维度。这些发现对使用LLMS构建复杂的基于代理的拟像具有重要意义，并突显了进一步研究LLMS中稳健人格生成的必要性。

[NLP-109] LLM-Oracle Machines
[NLP-109] LLM-Oracle机器

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12213
作者: Jie Wang
关键词: large language models, language processing tasks, natural language processing, leverage large language, applications leverage large
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、语言处理任务、自然语言处理、利用大型语言、应用程序利用大型语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Formal Languages and Automata Theory (cs.FL)
备注: 4 pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Contemporary AI applications leverage large language models (LLMs) for their knowledge and inference capabilities in natural language processing tasks. This approach aligns with the concept of oracle Turing machines (OTMs). To capture the essence of these computations, including those desired but not yet in practice, we extend the notion of OTMs by employing a cluster of LLMs as the oracle. We present four variants: basic, augmented, fault-avoidance, and \epsilon -fault. The first two variants are commonly observed, whereas the latter two are specifically designed to ensure reliable outcomes by addressing LLM hallucinations, biases, and inconsistencies.
摘要：当代人工智能应用程序利用大型语言模型（LLM）来获取自然语言处理任务中的知识和推理能力。这种方法与Oracle图灵机（OTM）的概念一致。为了捕捉这些计算的本质，包括那些想要但尚未付诸实践的计算，我们通过使用LLM集群作为Oracle来扩展OTM的概念。我们提供了四种变体：基本、增强、避免故障和\ris-fault。前两个变体是常见的，而后两个变体是专门设计的，旨在通过解决LLM幻觉、偏见和不一致来确保可靠的结果。

[NLP-110] Interface Design for Self-Supervised Speech Models
[NLP-110] 自我监督语音模型的接口设计

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12209
作者: Yi-Jen Shih,David Harwath
关键词: speech processing tasks, Self-supervised speech, downstream speech processing, SSL models, speech processing
中文关键词: 语音处理任务、自我监督语音、下游语音处理、SSL模型、语音处理
类目: ound (cs.SD); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Audio and Speech Processing (eess.AS)
备注: Accepted to Interspeech2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Self-supervised speech (SSL) models have recently become widely adopted for many downstream speech processing tasks. The general usage pattern is to employ SSL models as feature extractors, and then train a downstream prediction head to solve a specific task. However, different layers of SSL models have been shown to capture different types of information, and the methods of combining them are not well studied. To this end, we extend the general framework for SSL model utilization by proposing the interface that connects the upstream and downstream. Under this view, the dominant technique of combining features via a layerwise weighted sum can be regarded as a specific interface. We propose several alternative interface designs and demonstrate that the weighted sum interface is suboptimal for many tasks. In particular, we show that a convolutional interface whose depth scales logarithmically with the depth of the upstream model consistently outperforms many other interface designs.
摘要：近年来，自监督语音模型被广泛地应用于许多下游语音处理任务。一般的使用模式是使用SSL模型作为特征提取者，然后训练一个下游预测头来解决特定的任务。然而，不同层的SSL模型已被证明可以捕获不同类型的信息，而将它们组合在一起的方法还没有得到很好的研究。为此，我们通过提出连接上行和下行的接口来扩展用于使用SSL模型的通用框架。在这种观点下，通过LayerWise加权和组合特征的主导技术可以被视为特定的接口。我们提出了几种可供选择的接口设计，并证明了加权和接口对于许多任务来说是次优的。特别是，我们证明了其深度与上游模型的深度成对数比例的卷积界面始终优于许多其他界面设计。

[NLP-111] Knowledge Fusion By Evolving Weights of Language Models
[NLP-111] 通过进化语言模型的权重实现知识融合

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12208
作者: Guodong Du,Jing Li,Hanting Liu,Runhua Jiang,Shuyang Yu,Yifei Guo,Sim Kuan Goh,Ho-Kin Tang
关键词: Fine-tuning pre-trained language, demands extensive computing, extensive computing resources, Fine-tuning pre-trained, varying performance outcomes
中文关键词: 微调预训练语言，需要大量计算、大量计算资源，微调预训练、不同的性能结果
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Neural and Evolutionary Computing (cs.NE)
备注: Accepted by ACL2024 Findings

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Fine-tuning pre-trained language models, particularly large language models, demands extensive computing resources and can result in varying performance outcomes across different domains and datasets. This paper examines the approach of integrating multiple models from diverse training scenarios into a unified model. This unified model excels across various data domains and exhibits the ability to generalize well on out-of-domain data. We propose a knowledge fusion method named Evolver, inspired by evolutionary algorithms, which does not need further training or additional training data. Specifically, our method involves aggregating the weights of different language models into a population and subsequently generating offspring models through mutation and crossover operations. These offspring models are then evaluated against their parents, allowing for the preservation of those models that show enhanced performance on development datasets. Importantly, our model evolving strategy can be seamlessly integrated with existing model merging frameworks, offering a versatile tool for model enhancement. Experimental results on mainstream language models (i.e., encoder-only, decoder-only, encoder-decoder) reveal that Evolver outperforms previous state-of-the-art models by large margins. The code is publicly available at this https URL.
摘要：微调预先训练的语言模型，特别是大型语言模型，需要大量的计算资源，并可能导致不同领域和数据集之间的不同性能结果。本文研究了将不同训练场景中的多个模型集成到一个统一模型中的方法。这个统一的模型在不同的数据域中表现出色，并且能够很好地概括域外数据。受进化算法的启发，我们提出了一种知识融合方法Evolver，该方法不需要进一步的训练或额外的训练数据。具体地说，我们的方法涉及将不同语言模型的权重聚合到一个种群中，然后通过变异和交叉操作生成后代模型。然后对照它们的父代对这些子代模型进行评估，从而允许保留那些在开发数据集上表现出增强性能的模型。重要的是，我们的模型演化策略可以与现有的模型合并框架无缝集成，为模型增强提供了一个通用的工具。在主流语言模型(即纯编码者、纯解码者、编解码者)上的实验结果表明，Evolver的性能远远超过了以前的最先进的语言模型。代码可在此HTTPS URL上公开获得。

[NLP-112] Debate as Optimization: Adaptive Conformal Prediction and Diverse Retrieval for Event Extraction
[NLP-112] 作为优化的辩论：事件提取的自适应保形预测和多样化检索

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12197
作者: Sijia Wang,Lifu Huang
关键词: large language models, Adaptive Conformal Prediction, language models, outputs through debating, parameter tuning
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、自适应保形预测、语言模型、辩论输出、参数调整
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We propose a multi-agent debate as optimization (DAO) system for event extraction, where the primary objective is to iteratively refine the large language models (LLMs) outputs through debating without parameter tuning. In DAO, we introduce two novel modules: the Diverse-RAG (DRAG) module and the Adaptive Conformal Prediction (AdaCP) module. DRAG systematically retrieves supporting information that best fits the debate discussion, while AdaCP enhances the accuracy and reliability of event extraction by effectively rejecting less promising answers. Experimental results demonstrate a significant reduction in the performance gap between supervised approaches and tuning-free LLM-based methods by 18.1% and 17.8% on ACE05 and 17.9% and 15.2% on CASIE for event detection and argument extraction respectively.
摘要：我们提出了一种用于事件提取的多智能体辩论作为优化（ASO）系统，其主要目标是通过辩论而无需参数调整来迭代地细化大型语言模型（LLM）输出。在ASO中，我们引入了两个新颖的模块：Diverse-RAG（DRAG）模块和自适应保形预测（AdaCP）模块。DRAC系统性地检索最适合辩论讨论的支持信息，而AdaCP则通过有效地拒绝不太有希望的答案来增强事件提取的准确性和可靠性。实验结果表明，对于事件检测和参数提取，在ACE 05上，监督方法和基于免调LLM的方法之间的性能差距分别显着缩小了18.1%和17.8%，在CASIE上分别缩小了17.9%和15.2%。

[NLP-113] Aqulia-Med LLM: Pioneering Full-Process Open-Source Medical Language Models
[NLP-113] Aqulia-Med LLM：开创性的全流程开源医学语言模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12182
作者: Lulu Zhao,Weihao Zeng,Xiaofeng Shi,Hua Zhou,Donglin Hao,Yonghua Lin
关键词: made significant strides, significant strides, general domains, communities have made, made significant
中文关键词: 取得了重大进展，重大进展，一般领域，社区取得了重大进展，取得了重大进展
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recently, both closed-source LLMs and open-source communities have made significant strides, outperforming humans in various general domains. However, their performance in specific professional fields such as medicine, especially within the open-source community, remains suboptimal due to the complexity of medical knowledge. We propose Aquila-Med, a bilingual medical LLM based on Aquila, addressing these challenges through continue pre-training, supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF). We construct a large-scale Chinese and English medical dataset for continue pre-training and a high-quality SFT dataset, covering extensive medical specialties. Additionally, we develop a high-quality Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) dataset for further alignment. Aquila-Med achieves notable results across single-turn, multi-turn dialogues, and medical multiple-choice questions, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach. We open-source the datasets and the entire training process, contributing valuable resources to the research community. Our models and datasets will released at this https URL.
摘要：最近，无论是封闭源码的LLM还是开源社区都取得了长足的进步，在各个通用领域的表现都超过了人类。然而，由于医学知识的复杂性，它们在医学等特定专业领域的表现仍然不佳，特别是在开放源码社区内。我们提出了Aquila-Med，一个基于Aquila的双语医学LLM，通过持续的预训练、有监督的微调(SFT)和从人类反馈中强化学习(RLHF)来解决这些挑战。我们构建了覆盖广泛医学专业的大规模中英文医学数据集和高质量的SFT数据集。此外，我们开发了一个高质量的直接偏好优化(DPO)数据集，用于进一步的比对。AQUILA-MED在单话轮、多话轮对话和医学多项选择题上取得了显著的效果，证明了我们方法的有效性。我们将数据集和整个培训过程开源，为研究社区贡献了宝贵的资源。我们的模型和数据集将在此HTTPS URL上发布。

[NLP-114] BPO: Supercharging Online Preference Learning by Adhering to the Proximity of Behavior LLM
[NLP-114] BPO：通过坚持行为接近性LLM来增强在线偏好学习

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12168
作者: Wenda Xu,Jiachen Li,William Yang Wang,Lei Li
关键词: large language models, aligning large language, offline preference datasets, Direct alignment, desiderata from pre-collected
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、对齐大型语言、离线偏好数据集、直接对齐、来自预先收集的Desiderata
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Wenda Xu and Jiachen Li contributed equally

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Direct alignment from preferences (DAP) has emerged as a promising paradigm for aligning large language models (LLMs) to human desiderata from pre-collected, offline preference datasets. While recent studies indicate that existing offline DAP methods can directly benefit from online training samples, we highlight the need to develop specific online DAP algorithms to fully harness the power of online training. Specifically, we identify that the learned LLM should adhere to the proximity of the behavior LLM, which collects the training samples. To this end, we propose online Preference Optimization in proximity to the Behavior LLM (BPO), emphasizing the importance of constructing a proper trust region for LLM alignment. We conduct extensive experiments to validate the effectiveness and applicability of our approach by integrating it with various DAP methods, resulting in significant performance improvements across a wide range of tasks when training with the same amount of preference data. Even when only introducing one additional data collection phase, our online BPO improves its offline DAP baseline from 72.0% to 80.2% on TL;DR and from 82.2% to 89.1% on Anthropic Helpfulness in terms of win rate against human reference text. Comments: Wenda Xu and Jiachen Li contributed equally Subjects: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL) Cite as: arXiv:2406.12168 [cs.LG] (or arXiv:2406.12168v2 [cs.LG] for this version) https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2406.12168 Focus to learn more arXiv-issued DOI via DataCite
摘要：基于偏好的直接比对(DAP)已经成为从预先收集的离线偏好数据集中将大型语言模型(LLM)与人类期望数据进行比对的一种很有前途的范例。虽然最近的研究表明，现有的离线DAP方法可以直接受益于在线训练样本，但我们强调需要开发特定的在线DAP算法，以充分利用在线训练的力量。具体地说，我们确定学习的LLM应该坚持行为LLM的邻近，它收集训练样本。为此，我们提出了行为LLM附近的在线偏好优化(BPO)，强调了为LLM对齐构建适当的信任域的重要性。我们进行了大量的实验，通过将该方法与各种DAP方法相结合来验证该方法的有效性和适用性，在使用相同数量的偏好数据进行训练时，在各种任务上都有显著的性能改进。即使只引入一个额外的数据收集阶段，我们的在线BPO也将其离线DAP基线在TL；DR上从72.0%提高到80.2%，在人类参考文本的获胜率方面从82.2%提高到89.1%。评论：徐文达和李嘉晨贡献了同等的学科：机器学习(cs.LG)；人工智能(cs.AI)；计算与语言(cs.CL)引用AS：arxiv：2406.12168cs.LGhttps://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2406.12168 Focus通过DataCite了解更多arxiv发布的文档

[NLP-115] Statistical Uncertainty in Word Embeddings: GloVe-V
[NLP-115] 词嵌入中的统计不确定性：GloVe-V

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12165
作者: Andrea Vallebueno,Cassandra Handan-Nader,Christopher D. Manning,Daniel E. Ho
关键词: computational social science, social science applications, fields including law, Static word embeddings, Static word
中文关键词: 计算社会科学、社会科学应用、法律等领域、静态词嵌入、静态词
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Static word embeddings are ubiquitous in computational social science applications and contribute to practical decision-making in a variety of fields including law and healthcare. However, assessing the statistical uncertainty in downstream conclusions drawn from word embedding statistics has remained challenging. When using only point estimates for embeddings, researchers have no streamlined way of assessing the degree to which their model selection criteria or scientific conclusions are subject to noise due to sparsity in the underlying data used to generate the embeddings. We introduce a method to obtain approximate, easy-to-use, and scalable reconstruction error variance estimates for GloVe (Pennington et al., 2014), one of the most widely used word embedding models, using an analytical approximation to a multivariate normal model. To demonstrate the value of embeddings with variance (GloVe-V), we illustrate how our approach enables principled hypothesis testing in core word embedding tasks, such as comparing the similarity between different word pairs in vector space, assessing the performance of different models, and analyzing the relative degree of ethnic or gender bias in a corpus using different word lists.
摘要：静态词嵌入在计算社会科学应用中普遍存在，有助于法律和医疗保健等多个领域的实际决策。然而，评估从单词嵌入统计得出的下游结论中的统计不确定性仍然具有挑战性。当只使用点估计进行嵌入时，研究人员没有简化的方法来评估他们的模型选择标准或科学结论受噪声的程度，这是由于用于生成嵌入的底层数据中的稀疏性。我们介绍了一种方法，利用对多变量正态模型的解析近似，获得最广泛使用的字嵌入模型之一Glove(Pennington等人，2014)的近似、易于使用和可伸缩的重建误差方差估计。为了证明带方差嵌入(Glove-V)的价值，我们说明了我们的方法如何在核心词嵌入任务中实现原则性假设检验，例如比较不同词对在向量空间中的相似性，评估不同模型的性能，以及使用不同的词表分析语料库中种族或性别偏见的相对程度。

[NLP-116] Exploring the Impact of a Transformers Latent Space Geometry on Downstream Task Performance
[NLP-116] 探索变形金刚潜在空间几何结构对下游任务性能的影响

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12159
作者: Anna C. Marbut,John W. Chandler,Travis J. Wheeler
关键词: learning generic linguistic, transformer-based large language, generic linguistic knowledge, specific linguistic knowledge, linguistic knowledge
中文关键词: 学习通用语言学、基于转换器的大语言、通用语言知识、特定语言知识、语言知识
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:It is generally thought that transformer-based large language models benefit from pre-training by learning generic linguistic knowledge that can be focused on a specific task during fine-tuning. However, we propose that much of the benefit from pre-training may be captured by geometric characteristics of the latent space representations, divorced from any specific linguistic knowledge. In this work we explore the relationship between GLUE benchmarking task performance and a variety of measures applied to the latent space resulting from BERT-type contextual language models. We find that there is a strong linear relationship between a measure of quantized cell density and average GLUE performance and that these measures may be predictive of otherwise surprising GLUE performance for several non-standard BERT-type models from the literature. These results may be suggestive of a strategy for decreasing pre-training requirements, wherein model initialization can be informed by the geometric characteristics of the model’s latent space.
摘要：通常认为，基于变压器的大型语言模型通过学习通用语言知识而受益于预培训，这些通用语言知识可以在微调过程中专注于特定任务。然而，我们认为，预训练的大部分好处可以通过潜在空间表示的几何特征来捕捉，而不是任何特定的语言知识。在这项工作中，我们探索了BERT型语境语言模型产生的潜在空间中应用的各种测量与GLUE基准任务绩效之间的关系。我们发现，量化细胞密度和平均胶水性能之间存在很强的线性关系，并且这些指标可能预测文献中几个非标准BERT类型模型的令人惊讶的胶水性能。这些结果可能暗示了一种减少预训练要求的策略，其中模型初始化可以通过模型潜在空间的几何特征来通知。

[NLP-117] LLMs Are Prone to Fallacies in Causal Inference
[NLP-117] 法学硕士容易出现因果推理谬误

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.12158
作者: Nitish Joshi,Abulhair Saparov,Yixin Wang,He He
关键词: Recent work shows, causal inference tasks, causal relations, Recent work, causal
中文关键词: 最近的工作表明，因果推理任务，因果关系，最近的工作，因果
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recent work shows that causal facts can be effectively extracted from LLMs through prompting, facilitating the creation of causal graphs for causal inference tasks. However, it is unclear if this success is limited to explicitly-mentioned causal facts in the pretraining data which the model can memorize. Thus, this work investigates: Can LLMs infer causal relations from other relational data in text? To disentangle the role of memorized causal facts vs inferred causal relations, we finetune LLMs on synthetic data containing temporal, spatial and counterfactual relations, and measure whether the LLM can then infer causal relations.
